We can flip this seat: **A recent poll of Iowa voters found only 45% approve of Joni Ernst.**
And when voters were told about Joni Ernst's $50,000 campaign finance violation, her numbers dropped like a STONE.
**If we want to make any progress for our country on voting rights, healthcare, or climate change** , **we HAVE to flip the Senate in November.** That's why focusing all of our energy on the most vulnerable Republicans in the Senate is crucial for the future of our country.
[**We 're still 284 donations from our goal! Chip in to our Senate Battleground Fund to defeat Joni Ernst, Mitch McConnell, and the rest of Trump's cronies in November ->**](https://go.protectvoting.%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_flipthesenate_feb?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200204_Ernst_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9+-+Wersquore+still+284+donations+from+our+g&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200204_Ernst_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200204_Ernst_U1_X1")

body:
We're so proud of the incredible organizers and volunteers on the ground in Iowa who left it all on the field to turn out caucus-goers and get them in Elizabeth's corner -- not to mention our... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852acd5/45c30650/1fa5ffe0e/66e38315/2361486344/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
The results are still being tallied in Iowa, but we aren't sitting around waiting.

**We're moving full speed ahead to New Hampshire, the other early states, and beyond.** Even though the initial numbers in Iowa look good, they're not final. And since they were announced today instead of last night, we didn't get a big night of exciting news coverage about them (or the late-night boost in fundraising that usually comes with it).

That means we need every grassroots supporter, whether you've given before or not, to dig deep and keep powering our work -- which is exactly what this grassroots movement knows how to do.

**So today, we're setting a goal to raise $2 million by the time polls close in New Hampshire next Tuesday: That's what we need to fully support our organizing and advertising programs across the state.**

Unlike some of our opponents, we don't rely on wealthy donors or outside PACs to fund our get-out-the-vote efforts, which means this final boost won't happen without grassroots donors like you.

**[The primary season is just beginning. Can you chip in to help reach our $2 million goal and power our grassroots movement? The next contest is in just seven days, and we need to make new investments now.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852acd5/45c30650/1fa5ffe0e/66e38316/2361486344/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU8xN0ZfRUdMX0xBVV9DXzIwMjAwMjA0X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO17F_EGL_LAU_C_20200204_V1S2_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
We're so proud of the incredible organizers and volunteers on the ground in Iowa who left it all on the field to turn out caucus-goers and get them in Elizabeth's corner -- not to mention our volunteers who knocked over a million doors and made more than six million calls from across the country.

And we're about to do it all again in New Hampshire. But we don't have the final Iowa results, and that means the news isn't about the incredible grassroots movement we've built together.

It's on this team to step up in the next seven days so we can win big in New Hampshire and beyond.

**Hitting our $2 million goal before the New Hampshire primary will send a powerfully important message about the strength of this grassroots movement: We're built to last, and when we work together, we win.**

**[Can Elizabeth count on you? Chip in $2 right now so we can reach our $2 million goal and execute our organizing and advertising programs in the critical final days before the New Hampshire primary. Every single donation makes a difference.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852acd5/45c30650/1fa5ffe0e/66e38316/2361486344/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU8xN0ZfRUdMX0xBVV9DXzIwMjAwMjA0X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO17F_EGL_LAU_C_20200204_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for everything you do,

Team Warren

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: re: Georgia's voter purge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
Recently, Georgia's Secretary of State purged 300,000 voters from the voting rolls. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5ff/34a064cc/1b769127/70348b6/700073277/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friends - Recently, Georgia's Secretary of State purged 300,000 voters from the voting rolls, and Georgians lost their voice and their vote in the process. So we fought back. As a result of Fair Fight Action's litigation, Georgia's Secretary of State was forced to admit to 22,000 errors in the purge. We saved thousands more registration by grassroots organizing efforts. We're not done fighting either. We believe that every single voter has the right to be heard and counted. That's why we released a new ad last week encouraging Georgians to check their voter registration to find out if they were purged. We want to make sure every single voter knows about the purge and checks their registration status to confirm they did not have their rights stripped away. Our work so far has helped roughly 26,500 voters remain on the rolls. These are people who would have otherwise been purged and had their rights taken away. This is why our work is so important and why we need your help to continue protecting voting rights in Georgia and across the country. [**Make a $3 donation right now to help us protect the right to vote in battleground states across the country. Your support is critical to our fight for free and fair elections.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5ff/34a064cc/1b769127/70348b7/700073277/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwMjA0MjBWUlAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-voterpurge?refcode=IE020420VRP-full") **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5ff/34a064cc/1b769127/70348b7/700073277/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwMjA0MjBWUlAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-voterpurge?refcode=IE020420VRP-full")** Governor Kemp has a long history of voter suppression, and his allies are continuing the effort to silence our voices. We know all too well what effect this has on our state and our democracy as a whole, and it's why we need your help to continue our fight. Thank you in advance for chipping in today and for being part of our fight. \- Team Fair Fight **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5ff/34a064cc/1b769127/70348b7/700073277/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwMjA0MjBWUlAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-voterpurge?refcode=IE020420VRP-full")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Sneak peek at TONIGHT’s State of the Union
body:
In just a short time, President Trump will deliver his third State of the Union Address. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=728840d9b7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • February 4, 2020
---
| | |
# **Sneak peek at TONIGHT’s State of the Union**

**In just a short time,** President Trump will deliver his third State of the Union Address. This year’s theme reflects the President’s can-do optimism versus the Swamp’s baseless pessimism: It’s _The Great American Comeback! _

**🎬** [WATCH LIVE: President Trump’s State of the Union at 9 p.m. ET](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=628c5c9a65&e=3ee4985eea)

**You can expect** to hear a common-sense vision for our country tonight. Unlike the far left, President Trump will celebrate America’s unrivaled economic and military strength.

**He’ll encourage Congress** to work with him to keep building an inclusive economy—one where lower-income and working-class families continue making the fastest gains.

**And most important,** you’ll hear about the quality-of-life issues that really matter to Americans outside the Beltway bubble:
* _A Middle-Class, Blue-Collar BOOM: _The unemployment rate is near a 50-year low. Record stock markets are boosting 401(k)s. Wages are up, and income inequality is down. It’s about to get even better: President Trump’s NAFTA-replacing USMCA is expected to add up to 600,000 jobs and $235 billion to the economy.

* _Support for working families: _While the Swamp plays politics, President Trump is focused on results. Tonight, he’ll call on Congress to support his efforts to lower healthcare costs _without_ compromising America’s world-leading standard of care. He’ll also highlight the Trump Administration’s support for paid family leave, school choice, and greater access to affordable childcare options.

* _A stronger, safer America:_ Defending the rule of law works. Since 2016, the violent crime rate in America has fallen nearly 5 percent after rising each of the two years before President Trump took office. At the U.S.-Mexico border, apprehensions and illegal crossings are down. Overseas, terrorist leaders such as Qasem Soleimani and Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi are dead instead of causing chaos.

**President Trump **has kept his promise to put hardworking, middle-class families first. The Great American Comeback is evident everywhere you look, from the soaring economy to our powerful military. The results are strong, yet there’s more work to do.

**That’s a message** both parties—and all Americans—can unite behind.

[SNEAK PEEK: Meet the President and First Lady’s special guests for tonight!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=90ba72c13a&e=3ee4985eea)

---
|
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7c5d810535&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d2f7ca3da2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=e3874c97a4)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: James Mackler
subject: Read before the State of the Union:

body:
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa18c/18d6a294/4cc743e9/26d62fcb/86944084/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | I want to quickly touch base -- the State of the Union is tonight, and this is what I would like to hear the President address: \- How to improve **access to health care** , stop **rural hospital closures** , and combat **the opioid epidemic;**
- How to put an end to the this **disastrous trade war;**
- How to promote our**national security;**
- How to curb the **corrupting influence of dark money** in our elections. [_**Those are the issues I want to address as Tennessee 's next senator. If you care about those issues, too, chip in to our campaign before the State of the Union tonight. ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa18c/18d6a294/4cc743e9/26d62fc8/86944084/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme200204?refcode=jme200204&amount=5&recurring=1") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa18c/18d6a294/4cc743e9/26d62fc9/86944084/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDAyMDQiLCJlM3NnWVhOck1TQjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200204?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jme200204_m_&refcode2=107423")

---
| | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa18c/18d6a294/4cc743e9/26d62f34/86944084/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDAyMDQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200204?refcode=jme200204_m_other&refcode2=107423")
---
But truthfully, my expectations are low.
The President has proved time and again that he's out of touch with the needs of Tennesseans, and there are way too many senators afraid to stand up to him when he's wrong.
If we want to tackle these issues and more, we've got to change who we send to Washington.
**I 'm an outsider, a veteran, and a man of faith, and I promise my service will always uphold the oath I make to my country. I'll stand up for what's right and stand up to any president when they're wrong.**
[_**Our campaign is people-powered, and I 'm relying on grassroots support to win in November. If you can, please make a contribution before tonight's State of the Union address. Thank you.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa18c/18d6a294/4cc743e9/26d62fc8/86944084/VEsB/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme200204?refcode=jme200204&amount=5&recurring=1")
In service,
James

"" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" But truthfully, my expectations are low. The President has proved time and again that he's out of touch with the needs of Tennesseans, and there are way too many senators afraid to stand up to him when he's wrong. If we want to tackle these issues and more, we've got to change who we send to Washington. I 'm an outsider, a veteran, and a man of faith, and I promise my service will always uphold the oath I make to my country. I'll stand up for what's right and stand up to any president when they're wrong. "" In service, James | | | Paid for by James Mackler for U.S. Senate James Mackler is a member of the Tennessee National Guard and a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Tennessee National Guard, the Department of the Army, or the Department of Defense. Wade_? This is shameful. We will not go back to the era when women had so little bodily autonomy. _Roe v. Wade_ not only enshrined a woman’s right to control her own body but also allowed women to enter the workforce and help reshape our country as leaders of our communities. [**These 200 conservative legislators want to take us back. Let’s show them that we’ll fight them tooth and nail. Can we get 2,000 people to sign this petition to tell the Supreme Court to PROTECT _Roe v. Wade_?**](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=daf069ade87f4ef6ac91985cc475253c&_e=4VffJ5JFYn-aWyBa0clHvZuWftefH4fvJvb-b7tDRDVMWDJgYxJnq1lcCD9uZZKJfVfg7u11ei8D65-uL-LOFAA7ukCUWcBEjERq5R-RvoJLmVHip6BvAqyy9N1jPvXKa7CkLeDbnJyhTpEV2pBYuDvTOBCnmhdYIr_LMbTnv_D2PKiVQ7c2PBV2uYs4DLoDTrpQYM-q6NtPis8J8Nki2VNc6G35yx6sPukHcuTQoFFa0zVNEytnFg_Eb87NMMEtfweOsFq0FI8oo9u0iNdP4RjMTFzfDCq4-ulpXqXeVBzY6LaDGjvnk0ojfucsB_4L659hcUVUILcJbNlqB4je1A%3D%3D) Once again, we see that Republican leaders like Senator Steve Daines don’t care about protecting women’s rights, they want to control women’s bodies. They want to protect their own power. [**Sign now if you stand with women -- we need our voices to be heard.**](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=daf069ade87f4ef6ac91985cc475253c&_e=4VffJ5JFYn-aWyBa0clHvZuWftefH4fvJvb-b7tDRDVMWDJgYxJnq1lcCD9uZZKJfVfg7u11ei8D65-uL-LOFAA7ukCUWcBEjERq5R-RvoJLmVHip6BvAqyy9N1jPvXKNZD_VFUrZPQYbX0g-Vymor9RNtVbp5PX-k69MF2xc1W6iPV6XgJlHz9e-oJ9VDoHSAXMfcYf9-afn3y2MMsg8u4VV4NCXd3NuaBCoVoFb4gxKCP3S_mCjsMK2Hqys5mu5czyrJC6aykd-EYIJbFnuitJtoZ6mbg5r1jPAnUWUwywJIIciLUcks-ykbsn_GpPEBZ6YPgXw05zeWwZxwcqyg%3D%3D) Thanks,
Women for Wilmot

Wilmot Collins is Montana’s first black mayor, a 20+ year military Veteran, a refugee and now, a U.S. Senate candidate. The House has already impeached him, and his Senate trial will come to a close tomorrow - without hearing from any witnesses. **The American people know better:** CNN released a poll saying six in 10 Americans believe Trump does NOT deserve a second term - but we haven't heard from you.
If this can be confirmed, it would be HUGE for Democrats, so we're conducting our own Trump Approval poll. **But we 're still 21 responses short in 34223 to reach statistical significance, and the poll closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight.**** Will you let us know where you stand before midnight tonight?:**

name: Michael Bennet for President
subject: What you'll hear tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
(and what you definitely won't) | |
---
| Team - Tonight is Trump's State of the Union speech.

Here's what you can expect to hear: a lot of bragging about the "booming economy."

[Michael wants you to know the TRUTH:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaac0/134673f2/37ca9c0c/69972315/3449791238/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B3_020420_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") We're creating far fewer jobs under Trump than we were under the last three years of Obama's leadership. If we were creating jobs at the same rate, we'd have 1 MILLION more jobs added to the economy. That's the Trump jobs gap.

[But it doesn't stop there! Throughout Donald Trump's presidency:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaac0/134673f2/37ca9c0c/69972315/3449791238/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B3_020420_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

* Tax cuts went to the richest 1% instead of middle-class families
* Farm bankruptcies are up and farmers' incomes are down
* $28 BILLION were borrowed from the Chinese by Trump to cover up for his self-inflicted trade war that's already cost us $40 BILLION in tariffs

[Enough is enough. We've got to end Trumpism. Michael is the candidate to do just that. Chip in now, team >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaac0/134673f2/37ca9c0c/69972315/3449791238/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B3_020420_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Team Yang
subject: America just got a tech wake up call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=7078%2E377263%2EZfrQPz) Yang Gang --

Last night during the Iowa caucuses, the entire nation realized something the Yang Gang has known since the beginning -- **we desperately need a president who actually understands technology.**

This is a HUGE opportunity for our campaign to win over every single voter who saw what happened in Iowa last night and is now looking for a president who is ready to lead us into a future that is already here.

**[If we act now, we can make sure all these voters know that Andrew will be that president. name: Chris Putnam
subject: Our Union Remains Strong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PUTNAM FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, Tonight, **President Trump showed the world that America is back.** Thanks to his leadership, **the state of our union is as strong as it 's ever been.** **Our economy is continuing to create new opportunities for Americans across the country, with the lowest unemployment rate and highest wages recorded in decades****.** In fact, for the first time ever, low-wage workers are now earning raises faster than their managers. President Trump's commitment to the American people also extends to finally securing our border with Mexico. **In the past year, our country has successfully prevented over 970,000 illegal aliens from entering our country and breaking our laws.** The president has also successfully negotiated with Mexico to create a new partnership to prevent the flow of drugs across our border. With all of these achievements, we need to send a representative to Congress who shares our president's ability to lead and deliver results. **Kay Granger doesn 't share our commitment to Keep America Great. **Instead, she boasts a voting record that looks more like Nancy Pelosi's every year by supporting higher deficits, big government bailouts, and the continued funding of Planned Parenthood. **I 'm running for Congress to provide President Trump the support he needs to deliver even more wins for the American people. [Will you join me in supporting our president by donating $20 or more tonight?](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/QntpA1psX6Qsdz8iJfV93A/UIfTZLoZ2qRTf2BjTxSKXw)** **[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/QntpA1psX6Qsdz8iJfV93A/UIfTZLoZ2qRTf2BjTxSKXw)** [**President Trump has never wavered in his dedication to Keep America Great, no matter the costs. It 's time we show him and his agenda our support this fall. Can I count on you to chip in $20 or more right now?**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/QntpA1psX6Qsdz8iJfV93A/UIfTZLoZ2qRTf2BjTxSKXw) The state of our union couldn't be stronger, and I'm confident we can keep it that way. \- Chris

name: Cory Booker
subject: Trump is tearing our country apart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | Our president is a divider, not a uniter. I just walked out of the President's State of the Union address. What we heard from Donald Trump tonight was more of the toxic division that we've become accustomed to. He's tearing us apart instead of bringing our country together. I've always believed that the ties that bind us are stronger than the lines that divide us. As we work to elect a President and members of Congress this fall, it's important that we choose candidates who will help unite us instead of pushing us further apart. That's where you come in, team. **[I'm running for re-election to be one of those leaders. Please send in a donation now so I can keep a message of unity at the forefront of our national politics.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200204_CB_20200204-fr-CB-EM2-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Our country is deeply hurting right now -- and the past three years of Trump's hatred and bigotry have only added to the pain that millions of Americans are feeling. As I said often during my campaign for president, defeating Donald Trump is only the floor -- not the ceiling. Once he's out of office, we'll then have to begin the hard work of healing a country so wounded that it elected someone like him in the first place. **[I'm ready for the challenge before us, but I'm going to need your help. Invest in our campaign today to send me back to the Senate for another term.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200204_CB_20200204-fr-CB-EM2-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Let's also do everything we can to ensure that this was the last State of the Union address Donald Trump will deliver as our president. Sincerely,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200204_CB_20200204-fr-CB-EM2-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fbd/5fca0d19/7ae5b56c/291d3019/2577826169/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fbd/5fca0d19/7ae5b56c/291d3018/2577826169/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fbd/5fca0d19/7ae5b56c/291d3067/2577826169/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fbd/5fca0d19/7ae5b56c/291d3066/2577826169/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/unsubscribe").

Tonight, Donald Trump gave his State of the Union address to the nation. He looked the American people right in the eye and lied to us. We know what’s been true since he got behind that podium one year ago, and what’s been true every day since January 20, 2017. **Mr. Trump is a criminal. He abuses the powers of his office every single day. He must not win in November.** And even with that full knowledge, it is likely the Senate will acquit him tomorrow during their impeachment trial. I won’t go into my feelings about that particular vote, but I will say this: _If you show up for one thing this year, show up for this election._ [_**We need your help to vote him out — join me.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=M5l2K6CF-2BTeSi2jZtEX6WDq0JgL4SZ9fws6CW-2B-2BU1P01xbj6EyZD4VLtzX-2BFrvN-2FGr0DazM7bD3Jbxrp4rqlSTytC2OWmtm56ux37Kx4An-2FJviePkyeMz69bsuf9gK7C5p05-2Bl-2BBI2nDa0wqOsasygLmpzLNE0kNCIMrYW3rllYbZXYlCHatJ79P4-2BDsB-2Bg-2FsCJJ-2F8ysB5vYA0z4PBXbSaRQhZr-2BULf2RsDJkCHSQgM-3DLG_4_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjI06VISPfJIPkjxFld-2BrrlsLfWBgSznyC9eEQeuE67ByW7-2F4rW5t238CYEo3QD0Yc5apXTI3Wvx3agi0bISlYoObmfkRkRm79sRjk6imIXj7yw-2BKYTHYVEYD-2BqbHk-2B08WHL7hcXmoAjGzB-2F-2FurWkksST17-2F00z8IkaKvqb1lEe55d17QtuScN3wLTB4zSXZqTwzkf22hTo-2B9GPudoTjDcDQX401-2FnlKdFLCrtvVv5-2BiWzt8j3S1g59axSK3r0m8zbNnSMYfnrpTq8GQ447Lgw7gJk4iWdq4csu1kBd7jd6wCV54qP8KDiwUNJRfH-2B2of-2Fw5pYlmZZqd0oGjMSYOIVvKSohGl8YpUinw6kvakBpoqwsoKwmqwMHiNaOnJH5OcnBLti78dLPlXeTB8NklHKh) —Tom

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Welcome to #TeamHagerty Weekly
body:
Campaign Updates Straight To Your Inbox

No images? Click here https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-ntjktid-akrkktjik-u/

February 4, 2020 In Case You Missed It...Donald Trump Jr. & Kimberly Guilfoyle

Last week Donald Trump Jr. and Kimberly Guilfoyle were in the Volunteer State to support Bill Hagerty's campaign for U.S. Senate. They opened our first campaign office in Gallatin, Bill's hometown. Check out our recap video HERE. [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uCxjuyHkZ28]

TV Ad

We are excited to announce the release of our first TV ad. You can head over to our YouTube channel to subscribe and check out all of our ads by clicking the link HERE. [https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCoFmbd_zEYeZQbn6Qag0b-A]

Standing With Trump Against Impeachment

Even before President Trump was sworn into office, the radical Left and Fake News media began working overtime to impeach him. This sham trial led by Nancy Pelosi and her socialist "Squad," is not only trying to undo the results of the 2016 election but also steal the election in 2020.

Bill Hagerty will stand with President Trump to put an end to this impeachment witch hunt and get our Senate back to the important business of the American people. As Tennessee's next Senator, Bill will work each day to help advance President Trump's "America First" agenda so that we can secure our borders and continue our winning streak by keeping America great.

Be a Part of #TeamHagerty DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/eoq-november?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=EOM%20Nov%202] VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY [https://teamhagerty.ivolunteers.com/Register/Registration]

The Tennessee Primary is coming! Make sure you're registered to vote HERE [https://tnmap.tn.gov/voterlookup/].

subject: Time To Protest
body:
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/54290656:sDmOMWvN1:m:1:2214761648:32DA99E8A2FE5A772C4B72AF95A3A85D:r)

Dear Friends,

Tomorrow I will be going to the Oregon State Capitol to protest the "new" Cap and Trade bill with Timber Unity. **The Cap and Trade bill would cripple Oregon 's economy, cause massive job loss and would raise cost of living for working families.**

Even though this bill is in the Oregon State Legislature it does not mean a Congressman should let it pass or ignore the issues it would cause. **DeFazio, a Green New Deal sponsor, has stayed silent on this detrimental bill.** He does not advocate for Oregonians in D.C. or at home.

As your Congressman not only will I represent you and would communication between State and Federal government.

name: James Iacino
subject: I’m running for Congress because the future of our planet is uncertain and combating climate change is one of my top priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for Colorado
body:
| Our elected officials are not fighting for our planet. Team, My name is James Iacino, I’m a third generation Coloradan, a proud father of two, the former leader of Seattle Fish Company, and I’m running for Congress. Since I was a little kid I have loved exploring Colorado’s natural wilderness. As I worked my way up at Seattle Fish Company, I realized that we were not doing enough to protect the environment. My first green project as CEO was to install solar panels on our roof — we became the largest privately owned solar array in the city of Denver. **In 2017 Seattle Fish Company won Green Business of the year,** and we have been Denver Green certified for the last three years. [**I will carry my commitment to sustainability with me to Congress. Donate $15 or whatever you can right now to a campaign that is fighting for the future of our planet >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14668461/154041460/1372262065?refcode=em_sustintro_link1&amount=15&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODQyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2NmYjNjYS0zMzQ4LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z08R5rVWYszJ4bVs-FPRcLonKd7aCmnIZw45WPXmllA=) I am extremely proud of everything we accomplished at Seattle Fish, but one company’s actions are not enough to protect the environment. In order to preserve our planet for our children, Congress needs to take action. Fast. | | [Join our Fight](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14668462/154041463/1372262065?refcode=em_sustintro_button1&amount=15&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODQyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2NmYjNjYS0zMzQ4LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z08R5rVWYszJ4bVs-FPRcLonKd7aCmnIZw45WPXmllA=)

name: Team Scholten
subject: Iowans left behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Hi Peter,

In Iowa, farming is at the heart of our economy and many of our communities -- that’s not news to anyone.

But in Washington, farmers are far too often left out of the conversation. From trade aid and Renewable Fuel Standard waivers that favor corporations over small farms to failing to make mandatory country-of-origin label requirements on our meat, some of the hardest working people in our country are left high and dry.

Even worse, disastrous trade policies are actively hurting our farmers, at a time when we should be reaching out to help.

J.D. promises to fight tooth and nail for farmers when he’s in Congress. He’ll work with Democrats and Republicans, creating legislation that doesn’t leave millions of farmers behind.

**[We need a Congress that works for our farmers, listens to their needs, and passes legislation that helps them, not hurts them. Add your name to our petition today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14669337/154050564/1732318578?ms=em20_200205_farmerspt&refcode=em20_200205_farmerspt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWZjMTJlMS0zNjQ4LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gExwm_BHi25NJ9Oqji92gmsNGi1gEHXyqD489G7weHA=&emci=a037fcfa-7547-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&emdi=eefc12e1-3648-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6658013)**

clean_body: Hi Peter, In Iowa, farming is at the heart of our economy and many of our communities -- that’s not news to anyone. But in Washington, farmers are far too often left out of the conversation. From trade aid and Renewable Fuel Standard waivers that favor corporations over small farms to failing to make mandatory country-of-origin label requirements on our meat, some of the hardest working people in our country are left high and dry. Even worse, disastrous trade policies are actively hurting our farmers, at a time when we should be reaching out to help. J.D. promises to fight tooth and nail for farmers when he’s in Congress. He’ll work with Democrats and Republicans, creating legislation that doesn’t leave millions of farmers behind. Take a look at some of the headlines from the past few days: | The evidence is here and in the hundreds of stories we hear on the road. At every stop on the campaign trail, J.D. hears from folks who are struggling with crippling debt and looming bankruptcies. Thanks for standing up for what’s right. \-- Team Scholten =

subject: President Donald J. Trump
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
Did you catch President Trump's State of the Union Address? If not, I encourage you to check it out. Even in the face of the greatest political witch hunt in American history, President Donald J. Trump once again delivers on his promise to put America First.
I am fighting alongside our President to win in November 2020 and rid Washington of the Liberal Elites who are desperate to rig this upcoming election. Neither President Trump nor I are going to be able to do this alone. We rely on grassroots supporters like yourself; that is why I am asking you to help by donating $100, $50, or even just $25 today.
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pZOALCHQ3_NzKMg_wSUuI5bcBgyqcz6QMJmLOrY7XEGDCi_fZdBT9b_K5qs2sdpEdWKFy_9IsA8dG2qfjfu0BbKf165u48rVfkDjIlNSPnlXiy0ipn6noe6AV6q_YbwfZEkhnKiUpTqh_qCznAstvg9JIAOcyVkITus6R4lwlwkcLRWJXkmh_A==&c=qqKCx46oPYPEq7y8x6gZ6tn3kB_pWtJ4NYtCe0841Oec3NUjvDaFAw==&ch=Y8XFs_ySO8_U1bFWblLNyiywR0zT4I7eJP8uh0TNOWnWroLa1PopLQ==)

| I know the people of Lehigh Valley are tired of the Do-Nothing Democrat, Representative Susan Wild who shakes her fist at the President during the State of the Union address and then sides with Nancy Pelosi when she tears up a copy of the President's speech! Enough is enough - it is time for a change. I am fighting to re-ignite the energy in the PA-7th District by putting Lehigh Valley's interests first and supporting President Donald J. Trump's agenda.
Will you support me in this battle? By donating to my campaign today you will send a message to Rep. Susan Wild that we plan on winning in November! Please consider chipping in $100, $50, or even just $25 today.

---

| I look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail!
---
| For Freedom,

|

| Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07

Enough is enough - it is time for a change. I am fighting to re-ignite the energy in the PA-7th District by putting Lehigh Valley's interests first and supporting President Donald J. Trump's agenda. Will you support me in this battle? By donating to my campaign today you will send a message to Rep. Susan Wild that we plan on winning in November! Please consider chipping in $100, $50, or even just $25 today. | | | == | I look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail! | For Freedom, | | Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07 P.S. ~ Did you see President Trump's State of the Union Address last night? Meet Tim Ryan

Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Nancy has lost it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I can’t believe she did that. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8cffa0d48937e4d179595ea9ac3204f2990092c01a9703eb4c853ff1b3cc12895734c5ff6da2aa9bc9cf34d0431f65c470d7a031cf35c958)
---

Friend,
Nancy Pelosi has lost her mind.

Last night was a great and triumphant evening for our Country. While I gave a perfect State of the Union Address, Nancy threw a temper tantrum and ripped up the copy of the speech I gave her. She truly hates America. Take a look:
[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8cffa0d48937e4d10a002ca45b73b1ff596a5db66379e31c82c4c1b7c794dacbea15b0a698e2af9bf67c83852adae34e9eab9f7f93a00a5b)
The Do Nothing Democrats are furious that, unlike previous Presidents, I've kept my promises to the American People and now America is WINNING like never before.

Nancy's actions were an absolute disgrace and she is everything that is wrong with the Washington Swamp. When I ran for President, I told you I would DRAIN THE SWAMP, and that is exactly what I plan on doing, starting with Nancy.

There's no better way to show her just how much Americans have REJECTED her than by fundraising off her little stunt, which is why I want to raise another **TWO MILLION DOLLARS** in the **NEXT 24 HOURS.**

---

Crushing Nancy and her liberal dreams is absolutely paramount, so I'm really counting on YOU stepping up. Make sure she hears you loud and clear, Peter. This is so critical that a special group of donors have agreed to an EMERGENCY DOUBLE-MATCH on ALL CONTRIBUTIONS. Please contribute $42 in the NEXT 24 HOURS to send Nancy Pelosi a message that enough is enough, and your gift will be DOUBLE-MATCHED. >> STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP SUPPORTER: dpwillis67@gmail.com ACCOUNT NUMBER: 98336532 - 2020 CONTRIBUTION: PENDING DEADLINE: NEXT 24 HOURS CONTRIBUTE $42 = $126 CONTRIBUTE $250 = $750 CONTRIBUTE $100 = $300 CONTRIBUTE $50 = $150 CONTRIBUTE $42 = $126 CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT How can the Left argue with all of our great successes and continue to slave away for a corrupt Speaker that rips up a speech that said: "We have created 7 million new jobs." "The unemployment rate is the lowest in over half a century." "Every young person should have a safe and secure environment in which to learn and grow." "Our message to terrorists is clear: you will never escape American justice. If you attack our citizens, you forfeit your life." I need you right now, Peter. It's you and me against these Corrupt Liberals and I need to know I can count on you. My team is giving me a list of EVERY PATRIOT who contributes to our $2 MILLION GOAL, and I'm expecting to see YOUR NAME on that list. Don't let me down. Make sure Nervous Nancy hears you LOUD AND CLEAR. Please contribute ANY AMOUNT in the NEXT 24 HOURS to help us reach our $2,000,000 goal and to get on the list my team hands me. Thank you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States CONTRIBUTE $42 = $126 Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915 We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

This election is an extremely close race, and the New Hampshire primary is our next task in the road to winning the nomination, beating Donald Trump, and making big, structural change.

With no final results from Iowa yet, this next contest is more important than ever.

**Winning is going to take a lot of work -- and a lot of resources.**

| |
---
| | Last night, President Trump delivered an uplifting and unifying message to our nation. Under his leadership, we've seen historic levels of low unemployment and our economy is roaring again. As the 2020 elections grow closer, we need your help to ensure that President Trump wins states like Michigan and Pennsylvania and takes back the House of Representatives from the Democrats who impede our president at every turn. As a Trump Campaign State Chair, I need your help to show the President that Mississippi stands with him in 2020. Last night, we met our goal of 100 Mississippians donating to President Trump's campaign to show our support for his re-election and to help take back the House from Democrats.

We've decided to extend our fundraising campaign by 24 hours to show President Trump that Mississippi is committed to President Trump's plan for America. Click on the link below to donate just $7 and help Keep America Great.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: Winning feels so good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
Last night, we all gathered around the TV for what was one of the most epic State of the Union addresses our nation has ever seen. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a356edd6178d/winning-feels-so-good?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| |
# President Trump can’t stop winning!
Last night, we all gathered around the TV for what was one of the most epic State of the Union addresses our nation has ever seen.

**So much winning.**

President Trump has jump-started our economy into **RECORD GROWTH** , which has created jobs and **INCREASED TAKE-HOME PAY** for you and the rest of working America.

“Since my election we have created 7 million new jobs. This is a blue-collar boom.”

Under President Trump’s administration, our law-abiding citizens are being protected from aliens who break our laws to enter our country unlawfully. Over 100 miles of the wall on the southern border have been built and hundreds of miles more are planned.

“My Administration has ended catch-and-release. If you come illegally, you will now be promptly removed."

President Trump has obliterated terrorist threats abroad. While the progressive and socialist Democrats laud Baghdadi as an ‘austere scholar,’ President Trump cut through their false rhetoric and acted to protect you, me, and the rest of America.

“If you attack our citizens, you forfeit your life.”

Pregnant women and the innocent unborn have the most pro-life leader in the White House our country has ever known. From the slashing the funding of the baby-killing industry to appointing pro-life federal judges, President Trump is the ultimate advocate for the pro-life cause.

“Whether we are Republican, Democrat, or Independent, every human life is a sacred gift from God.”

You heard the President last night. He implored Congress repeatedly to put America first and help pass his agenda. **But his plans for continued greatness for America cannot happen without YOU AND I taking the House back for Republicans!**

I’m working hard day and night to get to Washington D.C. as your next Congressman from CD-22 to do just that.

Will you help me get to Congress to help President Trump continue Keeping America Great?

Sign up today to pledge to vote for me next week when early voting starts!
---
| [Pledge to Vote for Kathaleen](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=71a2ba3914&e=01c99b7fbd "Pledge to Vote for Kathaleen")
---
| Together we will defeat the Democrats!

God bless America. God bless Texas. God bless you.

Kathaleen Wall
---
|
---
| | Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
Kathaleen Wall for CongressP.O. Box 1429Sugar Land, TX 77487

If you come illegally, you will now be promptly removed." President Trump has obliterated terrorist threats abroad. While the progressive and socialist Democrats laud Baghdadi as an ‘austere scholar,’ President Trump cut through their false rhetoric and acted to protect you, me, and the rest of America. “If you attack our citizens, you forfeit your life.” Pregnant women and the innocent unborn have the most pro-life leader in the White House our country has ever known. From the slashing the funding of the baby-killing industry to appointing pro-life federal judges, President Trump is the ultimate advocate for the pro-life cause. “Whether we are Republican, Democrat, or Independent, every human life is a sacred gift from God.” You heard the President last night. He implored Congress repeatedly to put America first and help pass his agenda. But his plans for continued greatness for America cannot happen without YOU AND I taking the House back for Republicans! I’m working hard day and night to get to Washington D.C. as your next Congressman from CD-22 to do just that. Will you help me get to Congress to help President Trump continue Keeping America Great? Sign up today to pledge to vote for me next week when early voting starts! | "Pledge to Vote for Kathaleen" | Together we will defeat the Democrats! God bless America. God bless Texas. God bless you. ## About this Event
The Sullivan County Republican Committee invites you to "LEAP INTO VICTORY"! Please join us for a special kickoff dinner to the 2020 election cycle. Guest speakers include Hon. Kelly Ayotte, former US Senator, House Republican Leader Rep. Dick Hinch, Deputy House Republican Leader Rep. Sherman Packard and many more. In keeping with the identity of Sullivan County, you’ll be treated to simple fare prepared well. Enjoy hot appetizers and socialize before the dinner that includes locally smoked meats, corn bread, and comfort foods provided by Kirby’s Q of Alstead, NH. We'll also have other locally sourced products for you to enjoy as you meet candidates for the US House and Senate. $50 per person. A limited number of sponsorships are available! \- Team NHGOP

body:

It's time to make a plan to vote! Here's what you'll need to make sure you're ready on the day of the election.

It's been proven that you are more likely to make it to the polls if you actively make a plan to vote earlier in the day. So, find your polling place and then fill out the form by following the link below!

name: Sara 2020
subject: Senator Collins is just making excuses to justify her vote to acquit President Trump.
body:
Do you agree it's time to replace her in the Senate?

[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802922/4bef7a87/6d484b09/287fbfc8/959840268/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDUtMS1jIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200205-1-c")

Senator Collins says President Trump learned "a pretty big lesson" from impeachment and will be "much more cautious" from here on out.
Even President Trump doesn't agree with her:
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802922/4bef7a87/6d484b09/287fbfc8/959840268/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDUtMS1jIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200205-1-c")
Senator Collins can't _really_ believe Trump has changed. It seems like she's just using this as an excuse to justify her vote to acquit. She's proven she'll take Trump's and McConnell's side no matter what -- so we think it's time to replace her in the Senate. Do you agree?

name: MJ Hegar
subject: My decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I want to tell you a little more about it.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890458/7f51f7bc/4d73feba/4ef059d5/1619858189/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

Running for Senate wasn't an obvious choice for me. I'm not a politician, I have two little kids, and look: most things that go on in Washington really make me mad. So I want to tell you a little more about why I decided to run **[(if you're already on board, you can make a donation here).](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890458/7f51f7bc/4d73feba/4ef059d4/1619858189/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200205.1nd__870__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Senator Cornyn is an entrenched incumbent who's spent almost two decades in Washington serving the special interests and DC bosses like Mitch McConnell. Now he has more than $12 million in a war chest funded in part by Big Pharma, the gun lobby, and the private prison industry.

**I don't expect him to put Texas first anytime soon. That's why I had to get into this race.[Will you pitch in now to help us reach every undecided voter we can before voting begins in the Texas primary, and head into the next phase of the campaign in the strongest position possible?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890458/7f51f7bc/4d73feba/4ef059cb/1619858189/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MCIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200205.1nd__870__&amount=&recurring=true")**

In the last few years alone, Sen. Cornyn voted to rip health care away from millions of Texans, voted against a bill that would've lowered prescription drug prices, and refused to support any meaningful action on gun violence -- including measures that the vast majority of Texans approve of -- even after horrific mass shootings in our own state.

I intend to do things differently. **I will fight for you tooth and nail every single day.** My votes will always be based on what's best for Texans, not who's writing the biggest campaign checks. As the only political outsider in the race and a working mom who has personally faced the struggles of everyday Texans, you can be sure of that.

**If you're ready for a senator who will put you first, I need you to pitch in so we can build the campaign we need to win.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[**Express donate $5 >>**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890458/7f51f7bc/4d73feba/4ef059ca/1619858189/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200205.1nd__870__&amount=5")**

clean_body: I want to tell you a little more about it. | "" | | Hey Peter, Running for Senate wasn't an obvious choice for me. I'm not a politician, I have two little kids, and look: most things that go on in Washington really make me mad. So I want to tell you a little more about why I decided to run "" Senator Cornyn is an entrenched incumbent who's spent almost two decades in Washington serving the special interests and DC bosses like Mitch McConnell. Now he has more than $12 million in a war chest funded in part by Big Pharma, the gun lobby, and the private prison industry. I don't expect him to put Texas first anytime soon. That's why I had to get into this race. "" In the last few years alone, Sen. Cornyn voted to rip health care away from millions of Texans, voted against a bill that would've lowered prescription drug prices, and refused to support any meaningful action on gun violence -- including measures that the vast majority of Texans approve of -- even after horrific mass shootings in our own state. I intend to do things differently. I will fight for you tooth and nail every single day. My votes will always be based on what's best for Texans, not who's writing the biggest campaign checks. As the only political outsider in the race and a working mom who has personally faced the struggles of everyday Texans, you can be sure of that. If you're ready for a senator who will put you first, I need you to pitch in so we can build the campaign we need to win. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" "" "" "" "" Thanks for all that you do, MJ Hegar "" | MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. name: Congressman Al Green
subject: BREAKING: President Donald Trump was acquitted
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/O5MU8h6Zrm1KVNFWJf4Ou_rJC4gwllmd9LQyOIGGdKE=/2BtoKqi4HiPUUKGvDM48nKRAp5hn9PwF1f6LKQFeMWM=)
---
Breaking news: **The U.S. Senate just acquitted President Donald Trump.** President Trump abused his power, undermined our national security, and violated his oath to the American people when he attempted to bribe a foreign leader to investigate a political rival. **But we know that this is not a comprehensive list of Donald Trump 's abuses of power.** And we also know that he won't _stop_ abusing his power now. **He will take this acquittal as an open invitation to continue his corrupt behavior --_with no regard for Congress or the American people._** To add insult to injury, the Trump campaign is now raising millions of dollars based upon his corrupt and lawless behavior. I am disappointed that the Senate refused to do its Constitutional duty and hold a fair trial. It's outrageous that some of our leaders chose party over country and blind loyalty to the President over our democracy. But this fight is far from over. We will continue to investigate the President's corruption in the House. We will bring our case to the American people. _**And we will defeat Donald Trump in November.**_ [**If you 're with me, rush a contribution to ensure I can keep up this fight in the House. We need all hands on deck at this critical crossroads in our nation's history.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/O5MU8h6Zrm1KVNFWJf4Ou_rJC4gwllmd9LQyOIGGdKE=/E2_EGjImQwQ1e8BCz3Ses1TeKlJDyZF-LxEV525JFKw=?refcode=E1088-20200205-Acquittal-SL&amount=25) Fired up and ready to go, Congressman Al Green | **[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/O5MU8h6Zrm1KVNFWJf4Ou_rJC4gwllmd9LQyOIGGdKE=/E2_EGjImQwQ1e8BCz3Ses1TeKlJDyZF-LxEV525JFKw=?refcode=E1088-20200205-Acquittal-footer&amount=25)**

name: Jess B., National Finance Director
subject: We need to raise $100,000 by Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
And we can't do it without your help | |
---
| Morning, Team,

[The New Hampshire primary is less than a week away, and before voting begins, we need to raise $100,000 to fund our final push to persuade undecided voters.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaafc/134673f2/37cd7c8a/6997241d/2981465899/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[It's now or never, team. We've planted our flag in New Hampshire, but we can't win this without your support >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaafc/134673f2/37cd7c8a/6997241d/2981465899/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaafc/134673f2/37cd7c8a/6997241c/2981465899/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
After the chaos in Iowa, Democrats across the country will be watching the Granite State with bated breath.

[Michael is uniquely situated to succeed in New Hampshire.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaafc/134673f2/37cd7c8a/69972413/2981465899/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020520_AC_CO&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") Like Colorado, it's split evenly between Republicans, Democrats, and Independants, and recent polls show that up to half of voters there are still undecided.

[When those undecided voters make up their minds on election day, he'll be there.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaafc/134673f2/37cd7c8a/6997241d/2981465899/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

_But we can 't win this race alone._

[In this crucial final stretch until voting begins, we need all the support we can get. We need to keep our ads on air, our field organizers knocking doors, and our voter outreach program running.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaafc/134673f2/37cd7c8a/6997241d/2981465899/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[If we can't raise this $100,000, we won't be able to fund our final outreach push. We need your help now more than ever, team. Chip in $5, and let's have a big showing in New Hampshire! >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaafc/134673f2/37cd7c8a/6997241d/2981465899/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Andrew Yang
subject: We have the opportunity to win in New Hampshire -- but we have to act fast
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
New Hampshire has always been a natural home for this campaign and I think we can win. But we need your help now.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=7089%2E377263%2EAvWH7E) Yang Gang --

If there’s something I’m taking away from the Iowa caucuses, it’s that this race is wide open.

There is no clear frontrunner, which means we have an opportunity to come out on top. The New Hampshire primary is that opportunity.

New Hampshire has always been a natural home for this campaign. In New Hampshire, many more people vote and voting is far easier. Plus, the message hits home most directly.

**[I think we can win in New Hampshire, but not without your continued support. Can you chip in right now?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24668?t=5&akid=7089%2E377263%2EAvWH7E)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24668?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=7089%2E377263%2EAvWH7E)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24668?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=7089%2E377263%2EAvWH7E)
---

---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24668?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=7089%2E377263%2EAvWH7E)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24668?t=11&amount=25&akid=7089%2E377263%2EAvWH7E)
---
It’s time to work harder than ever, Yang Gang.

We have the CNN town hall tonight, the debate on Friday, and the primary on February 11. We need a fundraising surge to prove that we have the support it takes to win.

**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now. According to my team, you haven’t donated yet and I want to give you that opportunity now. It all starts here. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24668?t=12&akid=7089%2E377263%2EAvWH7E)**

This isn’t about you or me, it’s about the future of our country, Yang Gang. The question is: are we willing to let the status quo continue to ignore the country’s real problems?

You and I have the opportunity to change that.

Let’s go!

-Andrew **We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24668?t=13&akid=7089%2E377263%2EAvWH7E)

name: Team Markey
subject: last night was a disgrace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
Donald Trump's State of the Union last night was a disgrace.
# [](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de64/693b8b0a/43533c62/72de4bbc/1623392391/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
Donald Trump's State of the Union last night was a disgrace.
It was nothing more than a campaign rally filled with lies from beginning to end. This president proved himself yet again to be a racist who demonizes immigrants and terrorizes our communities.
Just as notable as what was in the speech is what he left out -- any mention of our climate emergency.
Donald Trump did not once reference climate change or any intent to act on it. The closest he got was saying he wanted to plant some trees.
Seriously. That's his big idea, and it doesn't come anywhere close to addressing the scale of this crisis.
Fortunately, this was Donald Trump's last State of the Union, and our movement is growing larger every day. Republicans and the fossil fuel corporations are no match for us.
Together, we can pass the Green New Deal and save our planet, but first, we need your help to win this race.

name: Dick Durbin
subject: The State of the Union
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
Last night, President Trump gave his State of the Union address. While he continued to push for his divisive and reckless agenda, one thing was clearer than ever -- 2020 is a defining moment for our nation, and we must take back the White House and the Senate in November.
From cruel, anti-immigrant policies to attacks on families' health care and more, this President and his Republican enablers are turning their backs on our nation's values and threatening the futures of hardworking families in Illinois and across the country. We need to stand together and send a clear message by soundly defeating them and their dangerous agenda at the ballot box.
**[Peter, the November election is our opportunity to hold President Trump and the GOP accountable. Can we count on you in the fight? Chip in $5 now.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-feb-2020?refcode=em200205i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Despite their claims, President Trump and the GOP aren't "making America great" \-- far from it. While President Trump advocates for reckless policies and tarnishes our nation's reputation on the world stage, Mitch McConnell has turned the Senate into a legislative graveyard that does nothing but confirm radical, right-wing judges to lifetime appointments to the bench.
The American people deserve a President and a Senate on their side, fighting to raise the minimum wage, secure our elections, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and move forward with real solutions to the climate crisis. And if we stand together, we can make it happen.
**[In order to truly declare that the state of our union is strong, we need to undo the damage caused by President Trump and Mitch McConnell. Contribute $5 now if you're with me in the fight to keep Illinois blue, flip the Senate, and defeat President Trump.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-feb-2020?refcode=em200205i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-feb-2020?refcode=em200205i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4e31/42ab3cf4/603b0eb9/135d525e/3605071191/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4e31/42ab3cf4/603b0eb9/135d525f/3605071191/VEsD/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin

101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

name: Governor Gretchen Whitmer
subject: My response to Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | | Team, did you catch my speech last night? I gave the official Democratic response to the State of the Union, and I took the opportunity to highlight the fact that while Republicans are talking the talk, Democrats in Michigan and around the country are walking the walk.

From statehouses to governorships to the halls of Congress, Democrats are getting things done for the American people. And with your help, we can do even more.

[**If you 're tired of all the talking Donald Trump does and you're ready to get to work, will you take a minute to weigh in?**](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTY5MTgyNzIS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDMwNDk2MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

---
| | **Do you approve of Donald Trump?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MTY5MTgyNzIS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDMwNDk2MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MTY5MTgyNzIS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDMwNDk2MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
I flipped Michigan blue in 2018 by focusing on the issues voters care about - healthcare, infrastructure, and an economy that works. **Team, no matter what Donald Trump says, I know one thing for certain: Democrats can accomplish anything when we come together and put in the work.**
Across the country, Democratic governors and Democratic legislators are expanding access to health care, funding quality public education, and finding solutions to fix our nation's crumbling infrastructure - how we #FTDR, or as we say in Michigan: fix the damn roads!
I'm proud of the work Democrats in Congress have done to make sure there's a check on Donald Trump. **And in states across the country, it 's clear that Democratic governors are the strongest line of defense against the harmful Trump agenda.**

NBC released a new poll showing 46% of people approve of the job Donald Trump is doing. Following the State of the Union, the DGA is conducting its own Trump Approval poll to test these results - but we haven't heard from you.
| | **Do you approve of Donald Trump?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MTY5MTgyNzIS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDMwNDk2MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MTY5MTgyNzIS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDMwNDk2MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

We can't let this moment pass us by - not after we've seen what a Trump presidency looks like.

I'm counting on you to speak out, Team.

Thank you,

Gretchen Whitmer
Governor of Michigan

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the DGA email list, [click here](https://www.pages02.net/democraticgovernorsassoc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=16918272&spUserID=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&spJobID=MTgyMDMwNDk2MQS2&spReportId=MTgyMDMwNDk2MQS2). | | Paid for by Democratic Governors Association.
---

name: SOTU Alert (Tiffany)
subject: what did you think?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
Friends, I really enjoyed watching President Trump’s State of the Union last night. He continued his commitment to build a wall on our southern border saying, "_**This will be a tremendous boon to our already very-strongly guarded southern border where, as we speak, a long, tall, and very powerful wall is being built. We have now completed over 100 miles and will have over 500 miles fully completed by early next year."**_
I thought he delivered a great, inspiring message and you know that I fully support building the wall. **President Trump's America First agenda is what is Keeping America Great!**
Friends, now you know where I stand but this was an important speech. So, I want to know what **YOU** thought. How would you rate President Trump’s State of the Union? [ **Rate the State of the Union** ](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=e19d17392c44452f9946bacecf8a3271&_e=4TnzGT1WnFozzVzeENhL8WpsMo9leB961gHNXaNuI8YmT-deE7-sIrmTT0YITdl-h5nsQis-IXqog9HEqGJ7sSYDB0bQcpVQGKsEJ_Po9Jwv92ShaP1xN4D8nBOhCyOUK-DltHBT3sUJX5Xk9kPmqPL1qYifkfKq0MYLh7FRfnUA4o8j-TyYit1KEOD3EpyesJtpvf1lFJnLvOVGws9ks4CIJ8yaoQwo-GKmebtdKBCqIUzo7jIVPiZbu6uLCKByfG7hdz2H6jUOZp7SwI3MmLIoNx0I36tMT3FoI0dmOKS1aKY-VGrhWXOr9DiFvFcZ8I1rTKufzLmWqDWU-pTlmqRyMF7A6iXCCPzrv_jjsMXavv86LUmNTpYncJshEPmfb0iPOtw3Ok5XcCDuOxKyrA%3D%3D) With the future of our country on the line, It is important for me to hear your opinion. Share your thoughts on President Trump’s historic speech below!

>
We always say that if Elizabeth could meet every voter in a townhall and talk with them one-on- one, she'd win this race in a landslide.

Unfortunately, that isn't possible (although with 30 states, Puerto Rico, and D.C. visited, over 100,000 one-on-one conversations with voters, and 1,239 voter questions answered at town halls in the last year, Elizabeth is certainly getting as close as she can).

So we need to make up the difference.

One invaluable way is this: the thousands of incredible volunteers who've knocked over a million doors, made more than six million phone calls, and sent millions of text messages to talk with people about the primary and Elizabeth's plans for big, structural change.

And the other big piece of the puzzle is running TV, radio, and digital ads to complement those conversations. It's part of our surround-sound strategy to reach as many people in as many ways as possible.

**When people see this story and hear President Obama's words, they'll recognize how Elizabeth's dedicated her career to fighting for working people.**

They'll also see that she gets results, like with the CFPB, which has already returned more than $12 billion to Americans who've been tricked and scammed by big banks and corporations.

**[Let's make sure as many people see this ad as possible. We've set a goal to raise $2 million before the New Hampshire primary for critical final outreach, including this ad, and we're running out of time to hit it. Please make a donation right now and let's put this ad all over the airwaves.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ac19/45c30650/1fa2e6c2a/66e3b20c/1151082048/VEsEDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItYWQtbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU8yN0ZfRUdSX0FEU19UXzIwMjAwMjA0X1YyUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-ad-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO27F_EGR_ADS_T_20200204_V2S1_P&noskip=true")**

Thanks,

Team Warren

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Sen. Marco Rubio: Trump State of the Union Reminds Us of What Matters to America
body:
"President Trump’s State of the Union address Tuesday night was a much-needed and refreshing reminder that life does indeed..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=16e9fab21f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **_Sen. Marco Rubio: Trump State of the Union Reminds Us of What Matters to America_**

“President Trump’s State of the Union address Tuesday night was a much-needed and refreshing reminder that life does indeed exist outside the Washington bubble,” Sen. Marco Rubio (R-FL) writes for Fox News.

“He spoke to the hundreds of millions of Americans who do not spend each day refreshing their Twitter accounts to find out the latest ‘hot take’ . . . It is time we focus on what matters to the American people, not to Washington pundits.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d86125972e&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.foxnews.com/opinion/sen-marco-rubio-trump-sotu-address-reminds-us-of-what-matters-to-america")
---
|
---
| President Trump seized the moment last night with a “powerful, patriotic” State of the Union message to Americans across the political spectrum. “And then House Speaker Nancy Pelosi reinforced his message with her oh-so-symbolic ripping up of the text. What, other than channeling the alienation of the Democratic base from the great American center, was she thinking?” the _[New York Post ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=344c3e4adb&e=3ee4985eea)_[editorial](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=256d3e3f76&e=3ee4985eea) _[](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3cfd2d391f&e=3ee4985eea)_[board](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=53e9828360&e=3ee4985eea) writes.
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump surprised an Army wife during Tuesday’s State of the Union address, bringing her husband home from Afghanistan and directly into the chamber . . . The crowd erupted with cheers and applause as Sergeant Williams walked down the steps to embrace his stunned wife and children,” Virginia Kruta writes for [_The Daily Caller_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=99d67539cf&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The jobs market kicked off 2020 in grand fashion, adding 291,000 in private payrolls for the best monthly gain since May 2015 . . . That was well above the 150,000 estimate from economists surveyed by Dow Jones,” Jeff Cox reports for [CNBC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=77f663ae30&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

---

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: 4.3 million Texans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5wDjp4LBrcL-xWUK9TKmi_FBt1bS_qylXZgX1r_llK4=/tZhDxCfM8I2dm7XGFIh9mqqQBDbywlrtk1U3Spk9IGc=)
---
Team,

First off, I wanted to thank every supporter who stepped up to donate before our last fundraising deadline - it means so much to us that you are on our team and that we can count on your support when we need it most!

The fight goes on, though, as the Trump Administration continues its assault on the health of millions of Americans.

Despite promising on the 2016 campaign trail: "I'm not going to cut Social Security like every other Republican, and I'm not going to cut Medicare or Medicaid," he has now proven that to be a categorical lie. Last week, the Trump Administration announced that it's going to dramatically alter the way the federal government gives money to states for Medicaid.

And while the Trump Administration knows that Medicaid is a lifeline for 71 million Americans, their decision will profoundly change this critical safety net in our country.

**[So, I need you to stand with me and sign my petition to send a message that we won't stand for cuts to Medicaid!](https://act.myngp.com/el/5wDjp4LBrcL-xWUK9TKmi_FBt1bS_qylXZgX1r_llK4=/tZhDxCfM8I2dm7XGFIh9mqqQBDbywlrtk1U3Spk9IGc=)**

This announcement also came with the news that the Trump Administration will continue to try to push work requirements on Medicaid coverage, which is antithetical to the program's goal of providing affordable health coverage to low-income communities.

These disgusting cuts disguised as "viability and sustainability measures" mean that millions of Americans will most likely lose coverage that they _can 't afford_ to lose. We can't stand idly by and allow the Trump Administration to cut Medicaid.

**[Add your name to my petition if you agree we must protect the coverage for the 4.3 million Texans enrolled in Medicaid and CHIP>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/5wDjp4LBrcL-xWUK9TKmi_FBt1bS_qylXZgX1r_llK4=/tZhDxCfM8I2dm7XGFIh9mqqQBDbywlrtk1U3Spk9IGc=)**

Thank you for your support,

Sri Preston Kulkarni
| | **[Add Your Name ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/5wDjp4LBrcL-xWUK9TKmi_FBt1bS_qylXZgX1r_llK4=/tZhDxCfM8I2dm7XGFIh9mqqQBDbywlrtk1U3Spk9IGc=)**
---

subject: Come help us this Saturday!

body:
|
---
Friend, We have less than 30 days until the Texas Primary on March 3rd and we need your help! This Saturday, we are back on the campaign trail and organizing a block walk to meet Republican voters across the district. Can you make it?
**Saturday, February 8th, 2020** 10:00 AM **Walgreens Parking Lot** 6048 S Hulen St.
Ft. Worth, TX 76132 If you've never blockwalked before, don't worry! We will provide you with all the materials, training, and yard signs you will need. Let us know you are coming by RSVPing on [Facebook](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/763gkTtEduLwiMeTnHxl8tpQ/bSgbOtqbp63yRNlEkuIjmA) or [shooting us an email](mailto:cody@putnamfortexas.com). If you can't make it, but would like to knock doors in your own neighborhood at any time, or have any other questions, please email [cody@putnamfortexas.com](mailto:cody@putnamfortexas.com). We hope to see you Saturday! \- Team Putnam
