Saturday, February 8th, 2020 10:00 AM Walgreens Parking Lot 6048 S Hulen St. Ft. Worth, TX 76132 If you've never blockwalked before, don't worry! We will provide you with all the materials, training, and yard signs you will need. Let us know you are coming by RSVPing on or mailto:cody@putnamfortexas.com. If you can't make it, but would like to knock doors in your own neighborhood at any time, or have any other questions, please email mailto:cody@putnamfortexas.com. We hope to see you Saturday! \- Team Putnam * PAID FOR BY PUTNAM FOR CONGRESS

name: Team Rita
subject: February issue of the Rita Review
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/NMWKLeZkGXWXj45NISd4upAWiE1TnyQ4qCfeFkbxiVE=/CEHJ_ckwsljd_chlMJ0mVrGzr4dzf8G-NNzl6pOihaQ=?refcode=200205-email) _Welcome to the February edition of the Rita Review! January was such a busy month, and we 're happy to share all the campaign happenings with you. From singing to listening to students, Rita's been busy engaging with members of our community from all walks of life: _ **Singing the National Anthem** Rita was honored to sing the National Anthem at the Scott County Democrats' Red, White and Blue Dinner. We were so happy to see all our friends and supporters. Events like these motivate us to fight to win together! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/NMWKLeZkGXWXj45NISd4upAWiE1TnyQ4qCfeFkbxiVE=/iH55YG516UlaQe7YIWrSLwTfhZHwJZ1mJnah_D1WRCE=) **A Very Important Announcement** Our team was recognized as one of the first Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee's Red to Blue races, meaning this race is one of the most important elections in 2020! This honor is all because of your grassroots support -- thank you! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/NMWKLeZkGXWXj45NISd4upAWiE1TnyQ4qCfeFkbxiVE=/xMoRkzQU4j5PYw7oVTF_XpsehAaapM75WXu-0dHRqDg=?refcode=200205-email) **Visiting Local Students** Rita visited Berg Middle School in Newton to discuss politics and government, and Rita took that opportunity to listen to the students, too.

As the Newton Daily News writes: "Of the many candidates or elected officials who have visited teacher Tyler Stewart's civics class in the past few years, few have really taken an active interest in the views of kids who are not even legally allowed to vote by asking what they think. Hart remained consistent to that effect." [**You can read the article here!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/NMWKLeZkGXWXj45NISd4upAWiE1TnyQ4qCfeFkbxiVE=/xYE9TI2iQv_Iamzw2WcZx_jSZGaAl5KunXz_KgU2M18=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/NMWKLeZkGXWXj45NISd4upAWiE1TnyQ4qCfeFkbxiVE=/xYE9TI2iQv_Iamzw2WcZx_jSZGaAl5KunXz_KgU2M18=) **Getting Big Money out of Politics** Rita, along with her finance staffers Kim and Jackson, are so happy to have the endorsement of End Citizens United and stood with them on the 10-year anniversary of the Citizens United decision. We need to fix our campaign finance system so the voices of our community members can be heard over the loud and powerful interests in Washington. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/NMWKLeZkGXWXj45NISd4upAWiE1TnyQ4qCfeFkbxiVE=/CEHJ_ckwsljd_chlMJ0mVrGzr4dzf8G-NNzl6pOihaQ=?refcode=200205-email) **Breaking Bread** Rita also spent a lot of time meeting with and listening to Iowans all across IA-02. Pictured below are just two of her meetings. She met with voters for breakfast at Mayberry's in Osceola, listening to their concerns about economic development, education and housing. Then, she enjoyed lunch in Leon to discuss healthcare and education. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/NMWKLeZkGXWXj45NISd4upAWiE1TnyQ4qCfeFkbxiVE=/CEHJ_ckwsljd_chlMJ0mVrGzr4dzf8G-NNzl6pOihaQ=?refcode=200205-email) _That 's it for this month's Rita Review. We're building our coalition by listening to folks throughout our district, so we'll have lots of updates in the coming months. If you want to help fund Rita's travel and future events, consider making a donation today! Thanks for reading._ | __**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/NMWKLeZkGXWXj45NISd4upAWiE1TnyQ4qCfeFkbxiVE=/CEHJ_ckwsljd_chlMJ0mVrGzr4dzf8G-NNzl6pOihaQ=?refcode=200205-email)**__
---

name: Tim Walz
subject: What the President didn’t say last night
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| My friend, President Trump had a lot to say during his State of the Union Address last night, but it's what he didn't say that spoke the loudest to me. We heard nothing about the existential threat of climate change. We heard nothing about his administration's attempts to gut coverage for preexisting conditions 2.3 million Minnesotans rely on. We heard nothing about the devastating consequences Minnesota farmers are facing because of his disastrous trade war. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/mVAaTG8E-bEZvRKMF4FobhcimqVFs1lE8n6zWbXzFVg=/EKQucUOB8YCfMZg0iPsjVgwqTn_hL23Sd7HImU-Yx7s=?refcode=header&amount=25)
---
My friend,
President Trump had a lot to say during his State of the Union Address last night, but it's what he _didn 't_ say that spoke the loudest to me.
We heard nothing about the existential threat of climate change. We heard nothing about his administration's attempts to gut coverage for preexisting conditions 2.3 million Minnesotans rely on. We heard nothing about the devastating consequences Minnesota farmers are facing because of his disastrous trade war.
We deserve better. That's why my campaign is working every day to elect allies who will help us deliver the progress Minnesota families deserve. And after last night, I'm more motivated than ever.
[**Will you make a contribution of $5, $10, $25 or more so we can keep fighting and get the job done in November?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/mVAaTG8E-bEZvRKMF4FobhcimqVFs1lE8n6zWbXzFVg=/EKQucUOB8YCfMZg0iPsjVgwqTn_hL23Sd7HImU-Yx7s=?refcode=body&amount=25)

With the mainstream media on the Democrats' side, we are up against a tough opponent.
Will you help President Trump and I fight back?

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: David Perdue just voted to acquit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14684758/154206699/664205141?refcode=em020520-header&refcode2=ce1a823c-7948-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTFhODIzYy03OTQ4LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mCCZJmMGfwUyyEn4nTbbDu39l3eUekYqwWVghO_6IkI=) **** | | David Perdue just voted to acquit. Trump stays.

You’ve been hearing me talk a lot about how we need more leadership in Washington. Today, we saw a glimmer of it. In voting to convict Donald Trump, Mitt Romney demonstrated a profile in courage. David Perdue demonstrated a profile in cowardice.

You deserve a Senator who knows how to lead. **I’m the only person in this race who would step into the Senate with governing experience.**

Having experience is one thing, but what kind of experience is just as important. My administration brought Columbus together and put us in the Top 25 Best Run Cities in America.

And I’ve shown political courage. As mayor, I stood up to the Sons of Confederate Veterans and banned the Confederate flag on Columbus city property after the racist rally in Charlottesville in 2017. **I will not abide racism and I will not abide the subversion of our Constitution to benefit a president in my political party.**

I’m on a Southeast Georgia tour right now, because this is a campaign of Georgians, for Georgians. This is how we are building a campaign to win in November. We had over 100 women turn out in Savannah this week who are ready to flip Georgia blue. I’m counting on their support, but I’m also counting on yours.

**[If we turn Georgia blue in November, we flip the Senate. The latest polling shows we can: Rush in a donation before midnight so we can choose courage this November. As a candidate who has disavowed all corporate PAC money, I’m depending on generous supporters like you to have my back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14684759/154206700/664205141?refcode=em020520&noskip=true&refcode2=ce1a823c-7948-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTFhODIzYy03OTQ4LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mCCZJmMGfwUyyEn4nTbbDu39l3eUekYqwWVghO_6IkI=)** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14684760/154206701/664205141?refcode=em020520&noskip=true&refcode2=ce1a823c-7948-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTFhODIzYy03OTQ4LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mCCZJmMGfwUyyEn4nTbbDu39l3eUekYqwWVghO_6IkI=)

clean_body: | | | | = ** | | David Perdue just voted to acquit. Trump stays. You’ve been hearing me talk a lot about how we need more leadership in Washington. Today, we saw a glimmer of it. In voting to convict Donald Trump, Mitt Romney demonstrated a profile in courage. David Perdue demonstrated a profile in cowardice. You deserve a Senator who knows how to lead. I’m the only person in this race who would step into the Senate with governing experience. Having experience is one thing, but what kind of experience is just as important. My administration brought Columbus together and put us in the Top 25 Best Run Cities in America. And I’ve shown political courage. As mayor, I stood up to the Sons of Confederate Veterans and banned the Confederate flag on Columbus city property after the racist rally in Charlottesville in 2017. I will not abide racism and I will not abide the subversion of our Constitution to benefit a president in my political party. I’m on a Southeast Georgia tour right now, because this is a campaign of Georgians, for Georgians. This is how we are building a campaign to win in November. We had over 100 women turn out in Savannah this week who are ready to flip Georgia blue. I’m counting on their support, but I’m also counting on yours. = | = If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = I am deeply grateful for your support. Yours truly, Teresa ****** ****** ****** ****** ****** ****** PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906 =

name: Team Ryan
subject: Re: Walked Out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
It was all lies. Fake. | | Hi team - making sure you saw this email from Tim about walking out of Trump's State of the Union. Folks from across the country are stepping up. But, with reporters writing that Tim's reelection is "the Congressional race to watch this year," we can't take anything for granted. [Tim is sure to be a top target for Trump and deep-pocketed Republicans? We need everyone to step up. Can he count on you to chip in today?](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb8/5486deaa/3e21e6a9/dcb9a18/3843781745/VEsH/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/standwithtimryan?refcode=200205_sotu2_top&recurring=1") Thanks, Team Ryan _ORGINAL MESSAGE:_ Team: I walked out of the State of the Union address last night. [](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb8/5486deaa/3e21e6a9/dcb9a1b/3843781745/VEsE/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/standwithtimryan?refcode=200205_sotu2_img&recurring=1") Taking a stand like this has its risks, but it's worth it. We need to stand up for our values. Donald Trump's theatrics and lies may make for good politics for him, but they are bad for our country. [My district in Ohio is one of the country's most competitive. Donald Trump and his allies will be pouring funds in to try to defeat me, especially after tonight. Will you stand with me by chipping in?](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb8/5486deaa/3e21e6a9/dcb9a1a/3843781745/VEsF/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/standwithtimryan?refcode=200205_sotu2_l1&recurring=1") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ **[Give Now: $20.20->](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb8/5486deaa/3e21e6a9/dcb9a1d/3843781745/VEsC/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/standwithtimryan?express_lane=true&amount=20.20&refcode=200205_sotu2_20.20")** **[Give Now: $50->](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb8/5486deaa/3e21e6a9/dcb9a1c/3843781745/VEsD/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/standwithtimryan?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=200205_sotu2_50")** **[Give Now: $100->](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb8/5486deaa/3e21e6a9/dcb9a1f/3843781745/VEsA/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/standwithtimryan?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=200205_sotu2_100")** **[Give Now: $1,000->](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb8/5486deaa/3e21e6a9/dcb9a1e/3843781745/VEsB/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/standwithtimryan?express_lane=true&amount=1000&refcode=200205_sotu2_1000")**
This moment is critical. We cannot allow Donald Trump to bully and lie his way into more power. Thank you for standing with me, Rep. Tim Ryan (D-OH)

---

| |
#
Meet Tim Ryan
---
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| | **Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
---
[](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb8/5486deaa/3e21e6a9/dcb9a01/3843781745/VEsO/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://facebook.com/timryanforcongress") [](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb8/5486deaa/3e21e6a9/dcb9a00/3843781745/VEsP/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan")
Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb8/5486deaa/3e21e6a9/dcb9a03/3843781745/VEsHBQ/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/update-your-information") Tim is one of the GOP's top targets in 2020, and big-money attacks from Trump Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb8/5486deaa/3e21e6a9/dcb9a02/3843781745/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), please click the link. If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb8/5486deaa/3e21e6a9/dcb9a05/3843781745/VEsHBw/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://timryan.bsd.net/unsubscribe") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Tearing up the 2020 Election
body:
President Trump’s State of the Union address last night was simply amazing.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363184-850505-4852480-11cb3b8807-7df514d058)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363184-850505-4852480-11cb3b8807-7df514d058) President Trump’s State of the Union address last night was simply amazing.

I watched the address with a large group of supporters and throughout the night I looked around the room to view their reaction.

I watched as tears built in the eyes of men and women as Rush Limbaugh stood in shock to receive the Presidential Medal of Freedom.

I could feel the warmth and love in the room as a soldier was reunited with his wife and young children.

And I could see the disdain in the faces of everyone in the room as Nancy Pelosi shredded the historic speech and threw it like trash.

It was in that moment I confirmed what is going to happen in November of this year.

Democrats are consumed with hate for President Trump. Their hatred controls every action they take.

They aren’t legislators. Congressional Democrats are spoiled children who skulk around Washington, upset that Daddy Trump won’t let them have their way.

[**With your backing**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363184-850505-4852480-11cb3b8807-7df514d058), the day that I’m sworn into Congress, I won’t be holding back in rounding up these spoiled children and showing our nation how ridiculous they’re behaving.

[**Help me make that happen by donating today.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363184-850505-4852480-11cb3b8807-7df514d058)

It won’t be a timid reporter asking Nancy Pelosi why she disrespected a Presidential address. It will be me, walking by her side and demanding she stop disrespecting our President and the American people.

Last night we watched Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib laugh, giggle and play games like bratty school children as President Trump addressed hundreds of millions of Americans.

During President Trump’s State of the Union Address in 2021, I will be in attendance as the Congresswoman from Florida’s 21st Congressional District, and I will proudly attend in support of President Trump (who will be one of my constituents) and the American people. And if the Democrats dare to show such disrespect again in my presence, **I’ll be teaching them a lesson they’ll never forget**.

[**Get me to Washington and watch me do it.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363184-850505-4852480-11cb3b8807-7df514d058)

Nancy Pelosi’s Congress has lost sight of its purpose (or never had it).

They’ve turned the Capitol into Clownworld and it’s past time to put them in check with mature individuals who put the business of our nation above hate and obsession.

It's going to take me, a first-term Jewish political outsider to put them in check, [**help me lead the way by donating today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363184-850505-4852480-11cb3b8807-7df514d058).

Thank you for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. Last night, I watched my opponent Lois Frankel, dressed in white, scowl, shake her head, boo and despite her 71 years, act like an ill-behaved child. [**Help me send her back to her true home in New York City and retire her from Congress.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363184-850505-4852480-11cb3b8807-7df514d058)

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-363184-850505-84585d41bbe610b-7df514d058)

| |

| |
# _**My Fellow Republicans,
Our President Rocked the State of the Union Last Night!**_
I know you’re as proud of him as I am! Let me take this time to update you on the state of our race! **We won two Youth Straw Polls to date by a margin of 60%-40% against our main primary opponent. **I am the candidate in this race who will represent your Republican values in Washington D.C. I will unapologetically support our President, Donald J Trump! I will fight against the radical democrats in Congress that are hell bent on removing him from office! I will fight to protect our second amendment rights, our religious freedoms and freedom of speech and I will fight for the right to life from conception to natural death. The Second District deserves a stouthearted candidate that will stand strong against the radical liberals of the Democratic Party. I want to take this opportunity to thank all of our caucus speakers across our district. Our historic grassroots movement to take back the House of Representatives in the 2nd District is doing better than ever. **THE BEST IS YET TO COME.** We invite you to take part in our campaign by chipping in $25, $50 or $100, your generosity today will help us in our fight to **KEEP AMERICA GREAT!** For Iowa in Liberty,

\- Bobby Schilling
| [Donate Now ›](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=79af2bfe3a&e=90fad69796 "Donate Now ›")

clean_body: | | | | | | | | My Fellow Republicans, Our President Rocked the State of the Union Last Night! I know you’re as proud of him as I am! Let me take this time to update you on the state of our race! We won two Youth Straw Polls to date by a margin of 60%-40% against our main primary opponent. I am the candidate in this race who will represent your Republican values in Washington D.C. I will unapologetically support our President, Donald J Trump! I will fight against the radical democrats in Congress that are hell bent on removing him from office! I will fight to protect our second amendment rights, our religious freedoms and freedom of speech and I will fight for the right to life from conception to natural death. The Second District deserves a stouthearted candidate that will stand strong against the radical liberals of the Democratic Party. I want to take this opportunity to thank all of our caucus speakers across our district. Our historic grassroots movement to take back the House of Representatives in the 2nd District is doing better than ever. THE BEST IS YET TO COME. We invite you to take part in our campaign by chipping in $25, $50 or $100, your generosity today will help us in our fight to KEEP AMERICA GREAT! For Iowa in Liberty, \- Bobby Schilling | "Donate Now ›" | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Bobby for Iowa, All rights reserved.

name: MJ Hegar Update
subject: update from the trail 🚗
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
MJ has traveled tens of thousands of miles and spoken to thousands of voters so far!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042d/7f51f7bc/4d742cc0/4ef05a4c/251535574/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter -- With less than two weeks until early voting begins in the Texas primary, we're going full speed ahead to make sure MJ is the candidate who takes on and _defeats_ Sen. John Cornyn. **MJ has traveled tens of thousands of miles and spoken to thousands of voters so far, but we need your help to keep up the momentum!** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042d/7f51f7bc/4d742cc0/4ef05a43/251535574/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20200205.2nd__867__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
**In Austin, MJ took the stage for one of the most important primary debates yet, hosted by the Texas AFL-CIO**. As an Air Force veteran and working mom, MJ made a powerful case for why she's the candidate with the best chance to beat Sen. Cornyn! **[Pitch in to help us make it happen>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042d/7f51f7bc/4d742cc0/4ef05a43/251535574/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20200205.2nd__867__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042d/7f51f7bc/4d742cc0/4ef05a43/251535574/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20200205.2nd__867__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
**In Houston, MJ sat down with the local chapter of Moms Demand Action** to talk about gun safety and how we can prevent gun violence in our communities. The short answer: kick Sen. Cornyn out of Washington! **[Make a donation to help us do it>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042d/7f51f7bc/4d742cc0/4ef05a43/251535574/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20200205.2nd__867__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042d/7f51f7bc/4d742cc0/4ef05a43/251535574/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20200205.2nd__867__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
**And in Dallas, MJ participated in the _Dallas Examiner_ Forum**, answering questions about community policing, environmental justice, and getting money out of politics. **[Pitch in to help her keep going>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042d/7f51f7bc/4d742cc0/4ef05a43/251535574/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20200205.2nd__867__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

**There are just 13 days left until early voting begins, Peter -- so if you've been waiting to make a donation, the time is right now. Will you make your first* donation today to help MJ win the primary and BEAT Sen. Cornyn?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
****[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042d/7f51f7bc/4d742cc0/4ef05a42/251535574/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=20200205.2nd__867__&amount=5")****
****[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042d/7f51f7bc/4d742cc0/4ef05a41/251535574/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=20200205.2nd__867__&amount=10")****
****[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042d/7f51f7bc/4d742cc0/4ef05a40/251535574/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=20200205.2nd__867__&amount=25")****
****[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042d/7f51f7bc/4d742cc0/4ef05a47/251535574/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=20200205.2nd__867__&amount=50")****
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042d/7f51f7bc/4d742cc0/4ef05a46/251535574/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20200205.2nd__867__")****
Thanks,
Team MJ

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042d/7f51f7bc/4d742cc0/4ef05a43/251535574/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20200205.2nd__867__&amount=10&recurring=true")

_*If you've already contributed to the campaign or donated through a different source, thank you so much! Our records are based on our online database which may take some time to update._

name: Warren 2020
subject: We can't afford to cut back our momentum now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Our team is going to continue to work our hearts out to inspire as many people as possible to vote for her next Tuesday. That means knocking on doors, making calls, buying ads, hosting events, and... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ac22/45c30650/1fbf106b2/66e3a42e/921500952/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Yesterday we announced that our team needs to raise $2 million to fund critical organizing and advertising efforts before the New Hampshire primary next week.

And today we need your support to stay on track toward hitting that goal.

If 208 people from Pennsylvania chip in $23 (our average contribution) now, we'll stay on track to hit this important goal. But not everyone reading this will donate. That's why we're relying on you.

This is going to be a long, competitive race, but Elizabeth Warren is never going to lose sight of what's important in this election: fighting for working families and making the case for big, structural change.

Our team is going to continue to work our hearts out to inspire as many people as possible to vote for her next Tuesday. That means knocking on doors, making calls, buying ads, hosting events, and getting Elizabeth's message out there -- and the money we raise to hit this goal will fund all that work before the primary.

**But we can't fall short of this goal. We can't afford to cut back our momentum now. Others have PACs to help bail them out. Elizabeth Warren only has grassroots supporters. Can she count on you?**

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: BREAKING: Cory Gardner just voted to acquit Trump in his impeachment trial days after helping McConnell block witnesses with firsthand knowledge of the president's abuse of power.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:

#
**Folks, Senator Cory Gardner just voted to acquit Trump in his impeachment trial. It 's outrageous -- and we need to fight back now to win this election in November. Donate $10 or more here:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200205-vote?refcode=em-200205&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

---
Washington is broken, folks. Today's impeachment vote is the latest example of just how far it has fallen.
We didn't get the fair trial we deserve thanks to Republicans like my opponent protecting Donald Trump instead of uncovering the truth.
**Let me be clear: I would have voted for witnesses. I would have voted for evidence. And I would have voted to convict.**
Trump held up foreign aid for his own personal gain in an attempt to influence our elections; if that isn't impeachable, what is?
The only way we can fix Washington is by electing leaders who are independent enough to stand up to Trump and McConnell, which is why I'm asking:
**Will you rush a donation of $10 or more to help our grassroots campaign defeat Gardner and flip this critical Senate seat? Your contribution is so important to our team today.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

On issues from impeachment to lowering health care costs and combating climate change, Coloradans deserve a Senator who will put them first, not a yes-man for Donald Trump.
Now that the Senate has abdicated its duty, it's up to the American people to reject Donald Trump -- and his Republican enablers like Cory Gardner -- at the ballot box in November.
Let's do this.
Thanks for being on this team,

name: Sara Gideon for Senate
subject: BREAKING: Senator Collins votes to acquit President Trump without hearing from witnesses
body:
Fight back. Elect Sara Gideon.

**BREAKING: Susan Collins votes to acquit Trump without hearing from witnesses**
Friends -
Senator Collins just cast a critical vote to acquit President Trump without hearing from a single witness.
She has proven time and time again that when it matters most, she'll always side with Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell.
And to make things worse, she's trying to justify her vote by saying Trump has "learned from" impeachment and will be "much more cautious" from here on out.
Does that make you angry? How about "disappointed?"
**[Fight back with a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon's campaign to defeat Susan Collins.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802924/4bef7a87/6d4c2761/287fbfbe/3871490920/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDUtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200205-2-full")**
**********[FIGHT BACK](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802924/4bef7a87/6d4c2761/287fbfbe/3871490920/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDUtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200205-2-full")**********
Keep fighting,
Team Sara

name: Susan Collins
subject: My vote to acquit President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
Moments ago, I voted to acquit President Trump. The criticism from my political opponents has been swift and harsh. Part of that might just be that they are mad that I refused to give into their attempts to pressure me. I also believe that the partisan origins of this proceeding -- impeachment passed the House without a single Republican vote -- was an indication of some of the weaknesses of their case.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDE3MTM2MjIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMDQ1NDIzMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDE3MTM2MjIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMDQ1NDIzMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_****_
Moments ago, I voted to acquit President Trump.
The criticism from my political opponents has been swift and harsh. Part of that might just be that they are mad that I refused to give into their attempts to pressure me. I also believe that the partisan origins of this proceeding -- impeachment passed the House without a single Republican vote -- was an indication of some of the weaknesses of their case.
My opponents also don't seem to share my faith in the voters when it comes to deciding who our elected officials should be. It was important for me to take my oath to do impartial justice seriously. I listened closely, I took extensive notes, and I asked questions of both sides. Ultimately, I concluded that the House Managers failed to prove their case. Here is a brief excerpt from the conclusion of my speech:
_It has been 230 years since George Washington first took the oath of office, and there are good reasons why during that entire time the Senate has never removed a President. Such a move would not only affect the sitting President but could have unpredictable and potentially adverse consequences for public confidence in our electoral process._
_It is my view that, except when extraordinary circumstances require a different result, we should entrust to the people the most fundamental decision of a democracy, namely, who should lead their country._
Peter, I am so grateful to have your support and friendship during this difficult process. **Now that this is over, it is time for the Congress to get back to work on the problems that are facing our great country.**
Thank you for letting me share my views.
Sincerely,
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDE3MTM2MjIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMDQ1NDIzMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Senator Susan Collins

subject: The Impeachment is Over!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
# President Trump is Vindicated.
The impeachment trial of President Trump is over. He has been vindicated and cleared of all charges.

Now is the time to focus on doing the work of the American people by tackling rising prescription drug costs, fixing our broken healthcare system, and continuing our historic economic growth.

While Nancy Pelosi and her Democrat colleagues shamefully throw temper tantrums, President Trump is signing trade deals, presenting plans for peace in the Middle East, rebuilding our great military, and overseeing the greatest economic comeback in memory. Whether the Democrats like it or not, Donald Trump won in 2016 and if last night was any indication he’s already won in 2020.
---
|

Dear supporters, This week, I heard the stories of supporters across our district: A cancer patient in Eugene who leaned in and told me, "I have to go home and rest now, but I wanted to tell you before I left, how important it is that we fight for Medicare for All. I am afraid I will end up homeless because of the bills. Thank you for fighting for us." A student at Oregon State who asked, "What will you do about student debt? I just don't know how I'm going to make it after I graduate." The server at the restaurant in Grants Pass who, as he was clearing the table said, "I heard what you were saying. Can I have a button?" A mom in Roseburg who shared her fears about the climate crisis and said, "I just joined a progressive political group on Facebook. I've _never_ been to an event like this before,." Then tears welled up in her eyes and she said, "But I'm here, because we just, we need this movement so much." The single mom who gets by making tamales in her kitchen who answered the door in the middle of cooking, and committed to vote for us. The trans artist who creates upcycled crafts for the Saturday Market, who committed to vote for us. The young woman at the door, who was angry about the bans on abortion care and said was ready to fight back, committed to vote for us. A dad with a baby on his hip, a Vietnam veteran, a bike messenger delivering lunch, an Uber driver, an unhoused grandmother...all committing to vote for us. We are building a movement that cannot be bought, and will not settle for the status quo. To win, we need**you** in this movement. Make a plan to volunteer this week! Onward, Doyle

clean_body: | | | | Special thanks to Oran Mor Artisan Mead in Roseburg for hosting a very successful fundraiser on Saturday! Gratitude to the Clean Energy String Band, many generous donors, and new Douglas County volunteers for joining us. | Dear supporters, This week, I heard the stories of supporters across our district: A cancer patient in Eugene who leaned in and told me, "I have to go home and rest now, but I wanted to tell you before I left, how important it is that we fight for Medicare for All. I am afraid I will end up homeless because of the bills. Thank you for fighting for us." A student at Oregon State who asked, "What will you do about student debt? I just don't know how I'm going to make it after I graduate." The server at the restaurant in Grants Pass who, as he was clearing the table said, "I heard what you were saying. Can I have a button?" A mom in Roseburg who shared her fears about the climate crisis and said, "I just joined a progressive political group on Facebook. I've never been to an event like this before,." Then tears welled up in her eyes and she said, "But I'm here, because we just, we need this movement so much." The single mom who gets by making tamales in her kitchen who answered the door in the middle of cooking, and committed to vote for us. The trans artist who creates upcycled crafts for the Saturday Market, who committed to vote for us. The young woman at the door, who was angry about the bans on abortion care and said was ready to fight back, committed to vote for us. A dad with a baby on his hip, a Vietnam veteran, a bike messenger delivering lunch, an Uber driver, an unhoused grandmother...all committing to vote for us. We are building a movement that cannot be bought, and will not settle for the status quo. To win, we needyou in this movement. Make a plan to volunteer this week! Onward, Doyle | | WE ARE OFFICIALLY ON THE BALLOT!!!! Thanks to everyone who helped get our campaign to this exciting milestone with volunteer time, donations, and enthusiastic support. | ENDORSEMENT ALERT! | "Time to take a stand and nest a fierce climate hawk in the House! Doyle Canning is a longtime leader in the climate movement, driven to run against an incumbent who hasn't done enough on climate during his 30+ years in Washington. Help us put Doyle in the House by contributing now!" - | IN THE NEWS... The Climate Leader My Generation Badly Needs "In the face of this looming disaster, it is more important than ever to elect a candidate who has proven themselves, time and time again, to be an uncompromising advocate of working people. Our movement knows that the coming years will be critical to our fight for a stable climate and an equitable future for all Oregonians and all Americans. That is why the Sunrise Eugene and Corvallis chapters stand behind Canning in her effort to lead Oregon into the decade of the Green New Deal. Our futures depend upon leaders like her doing everything in their power to fight for climate action..." | ANNOUNCEMENTS | Join us for the first Candidate Forum of the election, focused on climate and environmental justice. Doyle will take the stage and take your questions! * Feb 20th at 7PM United Methodist Church | Please join Doyle in supporting Johanis Tadeo for Springfield City Council! | | FLORENCE MEET & GREET, FEB 15 Join us for our first Meet and Greet in Florence! We are in for a great time at Old Town Coffee Roasters. | HOUSE PARTY IN PORTLAND FEB 16 Join us in Portland for a fun event to meet Doyle and learn about her vision for Oregon and the country! | FELLOWSHIPS! JOIN THE TEAM Your movement, your campaign, join our fellowship program today! Our Fellowship program serves two purposes: to elect new leadership in Oregon 04, and to train new leaders in electoral politics. Fellows join a scrappy network of passionate grassroots leaders. The program is open to all ages! | UPCOMING EVENTS Join us as we call our neighbors to chat with them about the election and spread the word about Doyle! Join Students for Canning and their beloved inflatable unicorn friends to register voters at Lane Community College. _ Join Students for Canning and their beloved inflatable unicorn friends to register voters at the University of Oregon. Join us as we call our neighbors to chat with them about the election and spread the word about Doyle! Free pizza will be provided. name: MJ Hegar
subject: What you need to know about Sen. Cornyn on impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Senator Cornyn and I took the same oath, but only one of us is taking it seriously.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042f/7f51f7bc/4d76fe97/4ef05b41/2812973853/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

I took an oath as a member of the United States Air Force to support and defend the Constitution of the United States. So did John Cornyn when he became Senator nearly two decades ago.

That oath means that Sen. Cornyn has a constitutional duty to put our country over political party, hear out the facts, and make a well-reasoned decision as to whether the allegations that the president abused his power for political gain warranted impeachment. Instead, here's what Sen. Cornyn said _before seeing any evidence in the Senate._ | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042f/7f51f7bc/4d76fe97/4ef05b40/2812973853/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?refcode=email_20200131.2IMnd__856__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
**[**Donate to defeat Senator Cornyn >>**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042f/7f51f7bc/4d76fe97/4ef05b40/2812973853/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?refcode=email_20200131.2IMnd__856__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
**[Sen. Cornyn violated his oath of office. Will you pitch in to help me defeat him next November?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042f/7f51f7bc/4d76fe97/4ef05b40/2812973853/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?refcode=email_20200131.2IMnd__856__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

As a combat veteran, it is unconscionable to me that a senator would flat-out reject his oath. Yet Sen. Cornyn has done just that, day after day, since the impeachment inquiry began.

Sen. Cornyn even lied about the impeachment trial saying, "It is simply false to claim that there were no witnesses." To make his conduct even worse, Sen. Cornyn used Congress upholding its constitutional duty to deflect from his total lack of legislative accomplishments for Texans. He went so far as to shift the blame to the American people. Take a look:
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042f/7f51f7bc/4d76fe97/4ef05b40/2812973853/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?refcode=email_20200131.2IMnd__856__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
**[Donate to help defeat Sen. Cornyn>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042f/7f51f7bc/4d76fe97/4ef05b40/2812973853/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?refcode=email_20200131.2IMnd__856__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
Sen. Cornyn has been Mitch McConnell's right-hand man in burying legislation on critical issues -- like universal background checks, lower prescription drug prices, and improved election security -- in Mitch McConnell's legislative graveyard. We won't let him hide from his record of putting his D.C. bosses and the special interests over Texans.

**I took an oath to defend our Constitution when I served in our military. So did John Cornyn when he became Senator. He violated his oath.**

Sen. Cornyn has forgotten about the people and the Constitution he serves. It's time we send him home. **[Will you pitch in to help me defeat him?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042f/7f51f7bc/4d76fe97/4ef05b40/2812973853/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?refcode=email_20200131.2IMnd__856__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thanks,

MJ Hegar

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042f/7f51f7bc/4d76fe97/4ef05b40/2812973853/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?refcode=email_20200131.2IMnd__856__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

clean_body: Senator Cornyn and I took the same oath, but only one of us is taking it seriously. | "" | | Peter, I took an oath as a member of the United States Air Force to support and defend the Constitution of the United States. So did John Cornyn when he became Senator nearly two decades ago. That oath means that Sen. Cornyn has a constitutional duty to put our country over political party, hear out the facts, and make a well-reasoned decision as to whether the allegations that the president abused his power for political gain warranted impeachment. Instead, here's what Sen. Cornyn said before seeing any evidence in the Senate. | "" "" "" As a combat veteran, it is unconscionable to me that a senator would flat-out reject his oath. Yet Sen. Cornyn has done just that, day after day, since the impeachment inquiry began. Sen. Cornyn even lied about the impeachment trial saying, "It is simply false to claim that there were no witnesses." To make his conduct even worse, Sen. Cornyn used Congress upholding its constitutional duty to deflect from his total lack of legislative accomplishments for Texans. He went so far as to shift the blame to the American people. Take a look: "" "" Sen. Cornyn has been Mitch McConnell's right-hand man in burying legislation on critical issues -- like universal background checks, lower prescription drug prices, and improved election security -- in Mitch McConnell's legislative graveyard. We won't let him hide from his record of putting his D.C. bosses and the special interests over Texans. I took an oath to defend our Constitution when I served in our military. So did John Cornyn when he became Senator. He violated his oath. Sen. Cornyn has forgotten about the people and the Constitution he serves. It's time we send him home. "" Thanks, MJ Hegar "" | MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard. MJ for Texas P.O. There's only one way forward, now. In the impeachment trial of Donald Trump, the United States Senate has just voted to acquit him of crimes against our democracy. They chose a cover-up instead of a true trial, and in doing so, they failed us. They failed to listen to the will of the American people, failed to uphold the oath they swore to protect our Constitution, and failed to put country over party. When Republicans side with a corrupt, lawless president out of blind party loyalty, we show up to call them out as cowards. When Mr. Trump brags about all that he can get away with, we show up to prove him wrong. Like you, I'm sure, I'm outraged. I'm disappointed. I wish things had gone differently. But I urge you, _hold on to this hurt and vote with it_. It's time we remind Washington, DC who they actually answer to: **you and your voice**. Real change happens when we come together -- join me and let's take down corruption in November. **There is only one path forward to removing Donald Trump from office.[_Commit to vote, right now -- this is our last chance to beat Trump._](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=M5l2K6CF-2BTeSi2jZtEX6WDq0JgL4SZ9fws6CW-2B-2BU1P311B5fgt8lPgKYCF0iO1j8oRnYhTlo5q0cnnZalgg2LJ9qUMg1-2Bo48XuL-2Frq4tsA4bq8NdWpIq2sftivz0-2Fv5NwSSo04SIZHveTKOmaOz4ybnI7ScwoKthFt7SJHRValp3HwK3IdMjhlaaPt5HNQoGvW6-2B63Ltl-2Baoqwa7YJVB9WEGHHumUrexhacNQiBWMXo-3DJwuO_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjI06VISPfJIPkjxFld-2BrrlsLfWBgSznyC9eEQeuE67ByW7-2F4rW5t238CYEo3QD0Yf1k1HpV-2F-2BU5K4puyll9kvmLWy14Sk7Jzm2oz85NqdFY-2B8DEqNEM3ZgwV9ti4MOTIL-2BAhOkK8VltRWz5HW0-2F2EUtuNHfW-2BJBh0asu6D7RP5AokfjP0-2F1lcx0fYlx5T69BAU3DB8vOegYv-2BYe5GgZPk-2BBFSUNximFa6-2FIRc46APP6FmHCLPWJpeuhYgIiSKMEAmOs-2BgLi2LkN0xs457kjcXMrfKuu1uKo9gAL5Z-2BOUERCCzSX-2Bnr2irQGjN28e9dBRzkvOrDNC2sh7Mwv1TQd4fDbDnmnnfrKypt4pLxuLWoAIH0ukfVq0xM-2Bu0u7TdTx-2FOv-2FZnsKKkqjJsWeU-2FQbQujmaseMjT3rYlZ4C2BGk9h2Q-3D-3D) We can't afford to miss it. ** Fired up,

name: Tina Smith
subject: Today's vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Today, I voted to remove the President of the United States from office. Alabama Senator Doug Jones did too.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200205-doug?refcode=em200205-doug&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend,

Today, I voted to remove the President of the United States from office. My good friend and colleague, Alabama Senator Doug Jones, did too.

Doug and I have a special bond: we were the only two Senators sworn in together in early 2018. I relied on Doug's experience as a lawyer, his advice, and his counsel throughout this process as we all worked through the legal and ethical issues of this case. Throughout the trial, we both took our oaths to carry out impartial justice seriously.

This was a difficult decision for many of us, but given that Doug represents a state that Trump won by nearly 30 points, his vote took an exceptional amount of courage.

This trial was not just about whether President Trump extorted our allies for personal political gains and then attempted to cover it up -- though it's clear that he did. It was also about whether the American people can hold their leaders accountable and defend our right to free and fair elections. It was about the type of country we want to be, and whether or not we have the courage to fight for it.

Doug, myself, and my other Democratic colleagues proved that we do. I know you do, too. That's why I'm turning to you for help today:

**Please, consider splitting a contribution of any amount you can afford between our campaigns today. Help Doug and I bring accountability back to our government and uphold the rule of law as you elected us to do.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200205-doug?refcode=em200205-doug&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---
| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200205-doug?refcode=em200205-doug&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200205-doug?refcode=em200205-doug&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200205-doug?refcode=em200205-doug&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200205-doug?refcode=em200205-doug&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200205-doug?refcode=em200205-doug&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
When the President solicits foreign nations to influence our elections with disinformation and prevents the public from hearing a full and fair account of that effort, we cannot afford to turn a blind eye.

**Our duty to defend the Constitution of the United States requires action.**

The truth is, I see more signs of common ground, hope, and determination in all of us than I do the fractures of division, distrust, and partisanship. This process may have let us down. But we must continue to hold onto the values inside each and every one of us that drives us to find common good within our communities, to organize on the issues that matter most, and to hold our elected leaders accountable. That matters.

Thank you for everything you have done, and will do.

Yours,

-- Tina

**President Trump has been a complete disaster for our country - but his abuses of power would not be possible without Mitch McConnell defending him at every turn.**
Now that McConnell has helped acquit Trump, we need 10,000 grassroots Democrats like you to speak out: **Do you approve of Mitch McConnell?**

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Pitiful. Disgraceful. A stain on the Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
What I had to say on the Senate floor today | |
---
| Friends -

Today, the Senate voted to acquit President Donald Trump of wrongdoing in his trial.

Make no mistake, this is a dark day for American democracy.

[But this November, we have one chance to stop Trump and his denigration of American democracy at the ballot box. And I'm running to be the one to take him on and ensure Democrats win up and down the ballot to send McConnell packing, too.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaaf4/134673f2/37c20655/69972549/539116176/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B2_020520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

As I said on the floor today, since arriving to the Senate 11 years ago, I've watched the greatest deliberative body on earth slide further and further into inaction and stagnation under McConnell's pitiful "leadership".

Since Trump was elected, we've acted as little more than an employment agency for a legion of unqualified, partisan judges and other nominees.

_It's clear our American democracy is broken, but it's not irreparable._

[_As president, I 'll work to rebuild the democratic norms and institutions that Trump has spent the last three years shattering for his own personal gain._](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaaf4/134673f2/37c20655/69972549/539116176/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B2_020520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

But to do that, we need to win -- and my finance director tells me we need to raise $100,000 before the New Hampshire primary on Tuesday to make that happen.

[I'll be honest with you. We staked our flag in New Hampshire. This is our do or die moment.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaaf4/134673f2/37c20655/69972549/539116176/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B2_020520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[I need your support now, more than ever. Can I count on you to make a contribution of $5 to my campaign? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaaf4/134673f2/37c20655/69972549/539116176/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B2_020520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaaf4/134673f2/37c20655/69972548/539116176/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B2_020520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
This is our moment. With your support, I know we'll succeed in New Hampshire.

- Michael

clean_body: What I had to say on the Senate floor today | | | Friends - Today, the Senate voted to acquit President Donald Trump of wrongdoing in his trial. Make no mistake, this is a dark day for American democracy. "" As I said on the floor today, since arriving to the Senate 11 years ago, I've watched the greatest deliberative body on earth slide further and further into inaction and stagnation under McConnell's pitiful "leadership". Since Trump was elected, we've acted as little more than an employment agency for a legion of unqualified, partisan judges and other nominees. It's clear our American democracy is broken, but it's not irreparable. "" But to do that, we need to win -- and my finance director tells me we need to raise $100,000 before the New Hampshire primary on Tuesday to make that happen. "" "" | | "" This is our moment. With your support, I know we'll succeed in New Hampshire. - Michael | | Paid for by Bennet for America Contributions or gifts to Bennet for America are not tax deductible.

subject: Protecting our Majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Progressive Majority PAC
body:

| | | | Peter -- At Progressive Majority PAC, we're committed to protecting vulnerable House Democratic incumbents in 2020 to make sure we don't lose the majority. During the midterms, Progressive Majority was instrumental in helping Democrats win tough races and we're building our movement for 2020. We're reaching out to you because you are an engaged voter and we'd like to learn more about your priorities next cycle. You can take our survey here, but should you feel you're receiving this email in error, we're very sorry about that. name: Mike Turner
subject: Did you see what Pelosi did last night?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDE3MTM2NTYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTcwMDQ1NDQyNwS2&mt=1&rt=0).

I cannot shake from my mind the horrible display of divisiveness and partisanship that I witnessed from Nancy Pelosi and her colleagues.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDE3MTM2NTYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMDQ1NDQyNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=NDE3MTM2NTYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMDQ1NDQyNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,
Last night, I attended the State of the Union and listened to the President as he laid out his policy plans for America.
_However, I cannot shake from my mind the horrible display of divisiveness and partisanship that I witnessed from Nancy Pelosi and her colleagues. And what Nancy Pelosi did tearing up her copy of the speech was terribly disrespectful._
Besides her usual rude behavior at this yearly event, Pelosi took things to a new extreme by ripping up President Trump's speech. This shocking act of hers was entirely unacceptable, especially for someone with the title of Speaker.
_**The divisive, extreme political games that Nancy Pelosi is actively participating in has to end**_.
It is time to end the partisan malice and anger that seems to be present at every corner of our current political discourse. Our leadership in Congress should be working for America rather than creating divisive partisanship.
[_**It 's time to get Congress back to work! Will you chip in today to help me get us there? **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDE3MTM2NTYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMDQ1NDQyNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_**[Chip in $75 to get Congress back to work>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=NDE3MTM2NTYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMDQ1NDQyNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Chip in $50 to get Congress back to work>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=NDE3MTM2NTYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMDQ1NDQyNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Chip in $25 to get Congress back to work>>>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDE3MTM2NTYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMDQ1NDQyNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Chip in $10 to get Congress back to work>>> ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDE3MTM2NTYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMDQ1NDQyNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**_
Thank you,

Mike Turner
**[**DONATE**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDE3MTM2NTYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMDQ1NDQyNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

* _Close Encounters of the Third Kind_
* _Columbus_
* _Hoosiers_ \- **the greatest sports movie ever made. The underdogs win, again. Shot at a great venue, too!**

[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2e4cc18fee6c4b4393118fe07364652f&_e=XNcrw4Jx9omIZOzIpyozPt1-MwI0BXaW-CNdspUvDB3_At6K2gu787o_l6OPADUssJWWjQokiJ9iKuOibnGhP4Z77AqkwAhyOGK1BkhEtCIGAr94GvoY9YVOOxn9NU7SeGVwnsCbuZ7Qp68SBrhTa1qIWf-nrTiqByIUWAqQLV5z2OUtAW889s7Jojl15rK0czv3fX_byTIM-hPl9ly09z4Xt6iOpE-ZqbBbGcDfnz9XWRJFHjlHLZ2aVM3926S9i0_a6GtG5O7i7SDM7T14C8iF9jNh-zrcnuOlOKMVkag9DhJK-HJmvLkyd5rPkV94fwDOokn1gdMVE0OhxD-kPZuws3FZ9A4SQDPQXHXEd3b3ZeZKDlCvCXUe7jE167xLH-QSwMvXLrMhbpmuhFLOyVmqzOfFwtBJys9oc2H5v6El7L-Dzx4kACMxxua4OHTykkqvmTFUoFih54iTQJjV1M8MDVkF8LjaTLJjv8xl-cQ%3D) [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2e4cc18fee6c4b4393118fe07364652f&_e=XNcrw4Jx9omIZOzIpyozPt1-MwI0BXaW-CNdspUvDB3_At6K2gu787o_l6OPADUsgFV5r8fOPHB-N1tfwAacvkOwDVCotYgMFkaR-5npQs9mDFZ-GXlfN1cYKh1dxBppss19u4E5IbAX3Etm-RvqAO_X8YCYx34jYrgbWN3lfHZHKuExuAtvBysu-4NTPhoNfrxmOQX8Epa4suGWiRJGvlqMqDrce5N2xGWq6bKyO_uwBgYMjC0fI8zFA_EomOruH6ovLcQGjgboeUQ8yL6gBjsxKI3I5GR4PQ2tH09tFS8ylo6aDCmmlOgAB_7E_ElQqxVXtI6oQJIXAeRHvo1HZlqi5ROa89V35Yew5wiSG9UtcYXarle_st6IxrDoP72lxMKm2h4-BvMpisFKKaVeotWIWQHXcoJmjHgdKErZqQyFBIvWSL0DE1bNxyPup2hb)
* _A League of Their Own _\- **ok, this one isn’t about Indiana, but it was filmed in[Huntingburg](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2e4cc18fee6c4b4393118fe07364652f&_e=XNcrw4Jx9omIZOzIpyozPt46GXMGW3sy2JHM3Ohx0LcVjZbNFFGnqvclQXJcCF1b29zQu89YKJr1H2IDqCbDjwct1MEpm33e_kffnvChf-MOynIUyiGx067TRYROg8EzXf2yH8ws1RrSP-7RpchWCmjhcZhUNOeYedTobafypHOjEGC9sHEwuhAImfHbjvSeq2-aqvSVRUzOwem1ntv2mpP-2NH6a0xGWVtbyDuGczqQa2MDjLqemSqS-gOSjqRyqAWzYD28pQX6J9_JcEyBrrN-YhIcN1wK9XUeaqUk4tT3WosNzdekVzgJ__Jal5lDQp4Ewt9BCLu5qbalKXXc4svybid0IrVyln_DQBZljJmS5I8rMDcMfDtxgRgT7Dk2C4moEc4-chIta66SEEDKoUlOhkTXplRF5HLacARIv8XHl1StRoL7szulsoIoQrlT) and [Evansville](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2e4cc18fee6c4b4393118fe07364652f&_e=XNcrw4Jx9omIZOzIpyozPuE4XpNgXNDvqyP28-QjdFIwOsgKrSE9UGUljRcegPHBq53e5EkgIL6wdkRTHUvNQhAnXd4kEGIC0sj4qXUpnizSZ_K-4HEVrEZ7ZyP6pERUuBIlGlJJTgC8qjutm52u1g8XJZNcZcsg3bIUL0A0zZC462BzbG37SKHsMBzUL1w9Ozus49yyRc1ZkFvolr2xbGW404L5u9kbPTeibJBnng8X8dAfM9VKGZGRHVU10umkE1zk6ig7y3XBiiooAEqvgzo7lVdQNBqARRxcfa0QPmSgEGuRTVWUE7agr5OT7YYD8I3ZnfiV3j5bOCJC2N7jMwy9FL1djAk-ZJC3QcD20UZu4Bj8ysaoxYzoqPXeb70oEfJRWw9b74AWtQRAdQ1FVIFmvRSTSw4AtSxrwNBrCu0%3D). **
* _Rudy_ \- **everyone’s favorite inspirational story about a true underdog.**
* _Raiders of the Lost Ark_ \- **OK, this one isn’t about the state of Indiana either, but it is about Indiana Jones. That counts, right?**
* _Some Came Running_ \- **Frank Sinatra and Dean Martin in Madison, what more can I say?**
* _Madison_**\- celebrating the Madison Regatta!**
* _Winning_ \- **Paul Newman and the Indianapolis 500, a match made in Hoosier movie heaven!**

_That’s Eric’s list! But we want to know — what’s your favorite movie about Indiana? Take our flash survey below and let us know! Flash Survey Q: What’s your favorite movie about Indiana? Thanks, -Holcomb Crew | | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. name: Mark Warner
subject: Impeachment just finished in the Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Frustrated doesn't begin to describe it.
|
---
| | Derek,

Frustrated doesn't begin to describe it.

I approached my constitutional duty to be an impartial juror in the impeachment trial with the seriousness it deserves. I wanted to hear from witnesses like John Bolton and Mick Mulvaney who were in the room with Donald Trump. Unfortunately, Senate Republicans blocked even the consideration of these witnesses and shut down the President's trial. You don't have to be a legal scholar to understand that blocking relevant witnesses probably means what they had to say would not reflect well on the president.

Truth is, Derek, the only thing we can do now is press forward, beat Donald Trump, and flip the Senate this November.

My team tells me our fundraising dropped dramatically during the impeachment trial, and that's OK. I had a job to do. But now I really need your help to make up for it. **Can I count on you to make your first* contribution to help us win in November?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-forward?express_lane=true&refcode=20200205_f_1_nd__453__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")** **[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d620/53d9897e/5377cf1e/1c89b16c/2069998382/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ1MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-forward?express_lane=true&refcode=20200205_f_1_nd__453__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d620/53d9897e/5377cf1e/1c89b16b/2069998382/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ1MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-forward?refcode=20200205_f_1_nd__453__&refcode2=express_lane_other")** We do not have time to dwell on what happened in the Senate today. All we can do now is elect a president and Senate majority who will respect the rule of law and put country over party. That path to victory runs straight through Virginia, and we've got our work cut out for us.

We've got the Trump campaign organizing heavily in Virginia and pouring money into the Commonwealth. We've got potential GOP opponents attacking my record and my vote on impeachment. To be blunt: our campaign cannot overcome this and win without your help.

**[I'm committed to keeping Virginia blue in 2020 and defeating Donald Trump. Can I count on your support?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d620/53d9897e/5377cf1e/1c89b16a/2069998382/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ1MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-forward?refcode=20200205_f_1_nd__453__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Let's get to work.

-- Mark Warner | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d620/53d9897e/5377cf1e/1c89b169/2069998382/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ1MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-forward?refcode=20200205_f_1_nd__453__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: This was not a fair trial. This was not justice.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f463/6cd27893/530f6e48/15864d46/3194000084/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | I voted today to remove Donald Trump from the presidency. This vote was not one I took lightly, but I saw it as my duty. He abused his power, violated the law, obstructed the investigation, and attempted to undermine our democracy. The Senate did not vote to remove him, but make no mistake, this was anything but an exoneration. Instead of holding a full and fair trial, seeking the truth, and insisting on hearing from first-hand witnesses and seeing directly relevant emails and documents, Senate Republicans ran from the truth and blocked all witnesses and documents for the first time in American history. **This was a historic**** _cover-up_****. A**** _sham_****. A national**** _disgrace_****.** The evidence is overwhelming that Donald Trump used the power of his office to wage a corrupt campaign to smear his political opponent, coerced a foreign country to help, and then engaged in unprecedented efforts to cover it up. And instead of being a check and balance on an out-of-control president, Senate Republicans blessed his behavior and in the process invited future corruption and stonewalling. This is a tragic outcome for our country -- because Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell saw his role very simply: protect Trump at all costs. [**The way forward is simple: we must save our country from Trump and McConnell by defeating both of them in 2020. Donate today and let's make it happen.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f463/6cd27893/530f6e48/15864d47/3194000084/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-02-05-impeachment&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") The U.S.Senate has utterly failed its responsibility. Mitch McConnell and his allies have endorsed an imperial presidency immune to indictments, investigations, or impeachment. They think the president is above the law. **That's utterly false and, this November, our movement has to show them that their actions have consequences.** Stand up to Donald Trump. Stand up to Mitch McConnell. Send them packing in November. [**Donate $3. Let's take back the Senate, defeat Trump, save our country, and power our movement to victory.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f463/6cd27893/530f6e48/15864d47/3194000084/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-02-05-impeachment&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") _Jeff_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f463/6cd27893/530f6e48/15864d44/3194000084/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2020-02-05-impeachment&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f463/6cd27893/530f6e48/15864d45/3194000084/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2020-02-05-impeachment&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f463/6cd27893/530f6e48/15864d42/3194000084/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2020-02-05-impeachment&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f463/6cd27893/530f6e48/15864d43/3194000084/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2020-02-05-impeachment&refcode2=express-buttons")
